programme.title: The Ice Rink Murders
programme.desc: After time away from the ice, elite figure skater Megan returns to training, only to find that a killer targeting skaters is giving a whole new meaning to the phrase "cut-throat competition."

programme.title: Secret Life Of The Pastor's Wife
programme.desc: Angie, the wife of a charismatic pastor who extols family values yet maintains an icy demeanour toward his own, seeks solace from her marital woes in the arms of her recently hired pool boy.

programme.title: Collard Green Dumplings & Apple Pie Potstickers
programme.desc: Chef Deborah prepares two dishes inspired by Chinese wontons: an all-American dish made with apple wontons and milk jam; and a collard green dumpling influenced by Southern cuisine.

programme.title: Schnitzel Sandwich Celery Root Remoulade & Chocolate Chip Cookie Brittle
programme.desc: Taking inspiration from one of his husband's favourite dishes as a child, Jake makes celery-root remoulade and adds a European twist to the fried chicken sandwich.

programme.title: More Chicken Chow Fun
programme.desc: Rachael raids her well-stocked pantry to make chicken chow fun, a fan-favourite recipe centred on wavy Chinese noodles, paired with chicken, sauteed vegetables and traditional Chinese sauces.

The cooks are divided into four teams where they must compete in the famous MasterChef Team Relay, in a bid to create one tasty, cohesive plate of food - with only 30 seconds to handover between each leg!
Follow Jason Wang and learn about the White Snow Osmanthus Crab, a classic Taiwanese dish that marries theatricality with oceanic umami. Master Chef Kuo Hong-che demonstrates how it is made.

programme.title: Appetite for Adventure
programme.desc: If you're hungry for excitement, this episode will certainly satisfy the most ravenous appetite for adventure. Join host Michael Yo for a wild desert horse-ride to a delicious dinner.
The Earth-Cleaning Bros' second mission: planting trees in the Elsen Tasarkhai desert! Led by self-proclaimed Mongolian expert Shaun, they set out with just one GPS coordinate.

programme.title: As Luck Would Have It: Murder 101
programme.desc: Gabbi's luck hits a snag after reuniting with Charles David, Dean of Criminology at Williams College. She's there as a guest lecturer, but when Charles is found dead next morning an investigation begins.

programme.title: The Venice Murders
programme.desc: Leaving her career behind, Celia follows her passion to Italy but faces crisis when her roommate vanishes. Alone, she joins eccentric Aunt Rosato to rescue her friend and unmask the abductor.
After over a year of hard work, the time has come to wrap up the epic project. The four directors and the master eagerly rush to see the completed stores as the dramatic grand reveal begins.
After their enjoyable outing, the Dokbakz return to their accommodation, ready to enjoy the real fun of Singapore. "Let's enjoy the moment, more important than platinum or gold!"

programme.title: Dallas: Glenhill
programme.desc: In an ideal neighborhood, a ramshackle bungalow with some vandalism and a faulty foundation falls in Derek and Chauncey's laps. A friend of theirs needs help with a flip and only has two weeks.
The Ingredient gamble is back and so is Luke Nguyen. Luke has brought in an array of South East Asian ingredients our contestants get to cook with in today's two round elimination challenge.

programme.title: Iraqi Salmon & Date Brownies
programme.desc: Jake makes two of his favourite super-simple crowd-pleasers. First, Iraqi roast salmon slathered in a caramelised onion and tomato sauce. This main dish is paired with a decadent fudgy date brownie.

programme.title: Soupless Chicken Soup & Carrot Sweet Potato Cake
programme.desc: This roast chicken and vegetable dish is truly two classics in one: amazing roast chicken with all the flavours of a soul-warming chicken soup, without the soup.

programme.title: Dallas: Beechmont
programme.desc: Derek and Chauncey buy a bug infested zombie with high hopes of turning it around. But when they encounter plumbing problems and an actual burglary, will their high hopes of a profitable flip be smashed?

programme.title: Chili For Maria
programme.desc: Rachael turns on the heat and shows how to prepare her sister's favourite meal, a chilli recipe made with black beans, chopped meat, spices and topped with a blend of cheeses.
Lau Pa Sat Satay Street, the Singapore version of Euljiro's beer alley: from skewers and beer to a variety of international cuisines, this place has it all. And of course the penalty game is a must!

programme.title: 效廉出发吧！今天去哪玩
programme.desc: 这一趟到南投，威廉、小舜相揪到鱼池chill一下！威哥带着小舜一起到鱼池享受熟男行程，从绝美人气咖啡厅一路chill到底！甚至把五星料理搬上游艇，用全新视角畅游日月潭！两人逛伊达绍老街，一路遇粉丝老板热情招待，超美味总统鱼酥卷，不用进大餐厅就能吃的到！拳头大的高丽菜包让怕烫的威哥大口吃！鱼池这里竟然有媲美荷兰羊角村的美景？还有会跳舞的土地，让威廉差点深陷泥沼？！千万不要错过，更多精彩内容请锁定东森超视33频道周日晚间8点「效廉 出发吧！」。

programme.title: Duck's Quack
programme.desc: Sarah suggests visiting the spare sounds section of the Big Shop when Duck loses his quack.

programme.title: Parasol Show
programme.desc: Umbrella is nervous about meeting up with his pen pal at the Parasol Show, so Sarah & Duck accompany him.

programme.title: Big Wheel
programme.desc: Stanley helps Seamus and Little Woo reconstruct the Big Wheel from Seamus' childhood. This is more difficult than Stanley thought it would be as it needs a clean and an upgrade.

programme.title: Buttons
programme.desc: Little Woo would like Stanley to help them find more noisy things in the museum. They go through the museum and pick out some things for a new exhibition.

programme.title: It Was So Hot.. I Got Chicken Pox!
programme.desc: Wobbly teeth, hiccups, hay fever, and sneezy problems, the talking animals discuss all the things that make them unwell.

programme.title: It's time to catch the bus
programme.desc: JoJo and Gran Gran miss their bus home, so the pair settle down to wait for the next one. But getting the bus isn't quite as simple as JoJo thinks it is.

programme.title: Wild Girls
programme.desc: Coco wants to play Wild Girls with Indy, but Chloe wants her to play another game.

programme.title: TV Shop
programme.desc: At the chemist, Bluey and Bingo have fun playing with the CCTV screens.

programme.title: Slide
programme.desc: Bingo and Lila are excited to play on their new waterslide.

programme.title: The Key Badge
programme.desc: Roly is digging in the garden when his spade suddenly hits something. It's a key. But what does it do? Duggee has his key badge, they can find out through trial and error.

programme.title: The Sailing Badge
programme.desc: Duggee and the squirrels are enjoying a day at the beach, when they encounter the Penguins who explain they were on a very important mission when they got sick.

programme.title: Hey Quacky!
programme.desc: Worm and Ladybird wonder what's going on at Squirrel Club. There's a gorilla playing drums, some helpful ducks, a hot frog, four goats and a hospital run by chicken doctors.

programme.title: Monkey Bay, Thailand
programme.desc: Glitch's plans to open a hotel on an unspoilt beach in Thailand go horribly wrong when a group of macaque monkeys steal his Grim-o-freeze gun.

programme.title: Chicory
programme.desc: It's Chicory singing about how she was discovered in the song "Chicory, Dickory, Dock!"

programme.title: Cauliflower
programme.desc: It's Cauliflower creaking away as she grows and sings her catchy "Cauliflower Creak" song.

programme.title: Come Back Cobs
programme.desc: The Cobs have finally had enough of Evil Pea's ungratefulness and team up with Supertato.

programme.title: Big Net Rescue
programme.desc: Carrot is determined to save Supertato from Evil Pea's trap without help from Prickly Pear

programme.title: Feeling Better
programme.desc: It's time to wake up but Tinky Winky isn't feeling well. Soon, Tinky Winky feels better but now Dipsy, Laa-Laa and Po don't feel well.

programme.title: Glasses
programme.desc: Dee encourages a friend to say 'glasses' and we go on a whirlwind word adventure.

programme.title: The OKIDO Fizz War
programme.desc: Mayor Oki and Geoffrey get competitive. Whose fizzy water will come out on top?

programme.title: Ice Scream
programme.desc: Betty the ice cream van is so full of ice cream that it's making her speed around town out of control. It's up to Mojo and Bo with the racer top to stop her and save those treats!

programme.title: Promises
programme.desc: Bluey keeps breaking her promises! But after seeing how much Bingo trusts Mum's word, Bluey learns the power of promises and why it's important not to break them.

programme.title: Obstacle Course
programme.desc: Chilli sets up an obstacle course in the backyard, but Bluey is disheartened when Bandit turns it into a race and beats her. After cheating in a rematch, Bluey discovers the importance of training in order to improve her skills.

programme.title: The World Record
programme.desc: The Squirrels want to get a World Record, but in what? And Duggee is too busy to help. "If only we had more Duggee's" muses Tag. Which gives Norrie a record-breaking idea...

programme.title: The Rollercoaster Badge
programme.desc: The Squirrels build the best rollercoaster anyone ever saw. From a sweet song, to spinning through a helix, and getting the full G-force, it's a ride Duggee's going to remember!

programme.title: Ladybird's Gameshow
programme.desc: Spot the odd one out or guess who lives here. A great memory tip from Duggee, an edition of The Agony and Eggstacy, and how to draw Enid - down to her last whisker.

programme.title: Campfire Choir
programme.desc: Today at Squirrel Club, there are all sorts of comparisons to learn - from small to smallest, hungry to hungriest, and Duggee to Duggiest!

programme.title: Ronda Reunion, Spain
programme.desc: Foz tries to play a Spanish guitar, and Xuli is delighted when her first ever souvenir selfie flutters out of it. It shows her on holiday as a child in a Spanish town with her long-lost friend Maria.

programme.title: Teasing
programme.desc: Bluey, Bingo and Mum get into a debate with Dad about the definition of teasing. As they recall all the times where he's been a Big Teaser, Dad argues that he was only just playing.

programme.title: Christmas Swim
programme.desc: The Heelers gather for a classic Aussie Christmas. Bluey gets a new teddy and introduces him to the whole family, but the family play too rough with him and now he wants to go home.

programme.title: Explorers
programme.desc: While waiting to be picked up from school, Jack plays at being a sailor trying to find his way back home to Australia. Meanwhile, Jack's Dad has got lost on route to collect him.

programme.title: Phones
programme.desc: Bluey and Bingo want to play restaurants with Grandad, but it's a little different than he's used to... he's going to need an app to order the food!

programme.title: Andy and the Baby Elephant
programme.desc: On Jen's birthday she and Andy are sent to follow a new baby elephant to make sure it can use it's trunk properly.

programme.title: Cup
programme.desc: Bella plays with her favourite cup - it makes the perfect drum for a sing along with Lift. Together, they visit Kingsley and Queenie who play the 'Tea Party Dash', but who will win?

programme.title: The Memory Badge
programme.desc: Happy discovers his wobbly tooth has come out, but he's lost it! He's having a problem remembering where he was when it fell out.

programme.title: The Theatre Badge
programme.desc: Duggee and the squirrels help to put on an amateur dramatic show.

programme.title: The Shadow Badge
programme.desc: There has been a power cut and the squirrels use their torches to make shadows.

programme.title: Go Jet Academy: Mudslide
programme.desc: It's a very rainy day at the Go Jet Academy and the Go Jetters are teaching the Cadets some crucial Go Jetter skills.

programme.title: The Sphinx, Egypt
programme.desc: Glitch and the Grimbots are on holiday in Egypt where the Grimbots bury the Great Sphinx in sand, leaving only its head showing.

programme.title: Too Loud, Thomas!
programme.desc: After Thomas loses his voice, he must find a new way to pass on a very important message.

programme.title: Rainbow's Niece
programme.desc: Sarah's new colour wheel reminds Rainbow that he has not seen his niece in a while.

programme.title: Extra Bounce
programme.desc: John's yellow bouncy ball is too bouncy, but Sarah thinks she knows where the solution can be found...

programme.title: Portrait

programme.title: Hidden Giants
programme.desc: From a legendary city swallowed by the jungle to an underground metropolis stretching 18 levels deep and even a forgotten pyramid, sometimes the biggest mysteries on Earth are closer than we think.

programme.title: Treasure Island
programme.desc: With weather preventing Darrell Miklos and the team from diving from the boat, they attempt a risky strategy. Garth makes a solo journey to explore a deserted island where he discovers a mysterious cross.

programme.title: The Black Dahlia
programme.desc: It's one of the most infamous crimes in American history: the gruesome murder of a young beauty, unsolved for decades. There's a long line of suspects, each more mysterious than the next.

programme.title: TWA Flight 800
programme.desc: In July 1996, one of the worst aviation disasters in American history leaves 230 people dead and countless questions unanswered. It's a tragedy that changes the aviation industry forever.

programme.title: The Linda Moulton Howe Files
programme.desc: For more than four decades, award-winning journalist Linda Moulton Howe has covered the most mysterious phenomena on Earth. Could her investigations lead us to a profound new reality?

programme.title: Snakin' Ain't Easy
programme.desc: Troy and Pickle help rid a citrus grove of pythons. Bill is forced to hunt solo for the day. Meanwhile, Brue and Zak mount an airboat to a new honey hole, and Dusty responds to a friend's call for help.

programme.title: Gangtey Lodge, Bhutan
programme.desc: Rob Rinder and Monica Galetti work at high altitude, 3,000m above sea level, at a hidden gem of a hotel with Buddhist connections in the remote kingdom of Bhutan.

programme.title: Tea and Coffee
programme.desc: Jason makes a splash with delicious recipes flavoured with tea and coffee, as well as getting a lesson in the do's and don'ts of serving a traditional Emirati cup of coffee. Chef Nick Alvis will be making a delicious sea bass and celeriac dish with a hibiscus infused cream sauce.

programme.title: DIY SOS (S34)
programme.desc: In south London, Nick and the team step in to help a group of siblings grieving the recent loss of their mum.

programme.title: Junior Bake Off (S5)
programme.desc: It's Pastry Day for the Heat B bakers and their last chance to win a place in Finals week. The bakers are tasked with creating a showstopper based on their favourite meal.

programme.title: London - Part 1
programme.desc: London epitomises the international UK food scene. Here, Rick discovers how Chinese dim sum and Italian mozzarella are made, before tucking into a full English breakfast with Stuart Maconie.

programme.title: Family Days Out
programme.desc: Nadiya Hussain creates dishes for the perfect family day out, visits a rapeseed farm in Northampton and meets Gillian, Cornish Pasty Amateur World Champion.

programme.title: DIY SOS (S34)
programme.desc: In south London, Nick and the team step in to help a group of siblings grieving the recent loss of their mum.

programme.title: Gangtey Lodge, Bhutan
programme.desc: Rob Rinder and Monica Galetti work at high altitude, 3,000m above sea level, at a hidden gem of a hotel with Buddhist connections in the remote kingdom of Bhutan.

programme.title: Tea and Coffee
programme.desc: Jason makes a splash with delicious recipes flavoured with tea and coffee, as well as getting a lesson in the do's and don'ts of serving a traditional Emirati cup of coffee. Chef Nick Alvis will be making a delicious sea bass and celeriac dish with a hibiscus infused cream sauce.

programme.title: 天命
programme.desc: 和珅(陈展鹏)相中皇子永琰(谭俊彦)为皇帝。乾隆驾崩后，嘉庆帝说服和珅儿子丰绅殷德(何广沛)以及心腹福长安(陈山聪)倒戈，意图歼灭和珅及其党羽。然而和珅早有对策，不但化解嘉庆攻击；更反客为主，揭出皇贵妃(李施嬅)秘密，令嘉庆腹背受敌！_x000D__x000D_和珅二夫人长媚(姚子羚)和红颜知己豆蔻(唐诗咏)亦分头行事，令嘉庆亲弟永璘(张颕康)与之反目成仇，而白莲教也在江湖上兴风作浪，令嘉庆陷入绝境。岂料天命难违……

programme.title: 酒店风云
programme.desc: 酒店大亨王玉廷离世后，王家随即掀起一场争产战，叁子启杰(吴卓羲)离家出走，杰母遭两位同父异母的兄长迫走。更甚者，杰此时发现父亲早已将名下酒店股份转给了一个名叫高峰(马德钟)的人！_x000D__x000D_ 原来峰是为报仇而来，誓要将酒店得到手。危城告急，叁兄弟将个人恩怨放下，更不惜拉拢对王家产业一直虎视眈眈的舅父郑永发(姜大伟)连手对付峰。惟峰为人心狠手辣，众人被逐一打垮。_x000D__x000D_ 峰在王氏集团的地位稳如泰山之际，赫然发现女友顾碧琦(郭可盈)走近自己原来别有用心……

programme.title: 酒店风云
programme.desc: 酒店大亨王玉廷离世后，王家随即掀起一场争产战，叁子启杰(吴卓羲)离家出走，杰母遭两位同父异母的兄长迫走。更甚者，杰此时发现父亲早已将名下酒店股份转给了一个名叫高峰(马德钟)的人！_x000D__x000D_ 原来峰是为报仇而来，誓要将酒店得到手。危城告急，叁兄弟将个人恩怨放下，更不惜拉拢对王家产业一直虎视眈眈的舅父郑永发(姜大伟)连手对付峰。惟峰为人心狠手辣，众人被逐一打垮。_x000D__x000D_ 峰在王氏集团的地位稳如泰山之际，赫然发现女友顾碧琦(郭可盈)走近自己原来别有用心……

programme.title: 味想天开
programme.desc: 大唐盛世，丁一山因拥有「金舌头」成为「地狱食评家」，与名厨盖兆天亦敌亦友，还同时爱上爽朗胡姬石柔，遂互斗厨艺，「味」分高下……一山无意间发现自己身世，原来生父含冤而死，兆天父子也有嫌疑，如何为父雪冤？

programme.title: 公主嫁到
programme.desc: 刁蛮任性的昭阳公主(佘诗曼)为避嫁吐蕃急招驸马，一代金店掌舵人丁来喜(关菊英)主动送上门，因二儿子金多禄(陈豪)及叁儿子金多寿(黄浩然)均属单身，希望藉此解决金店面临的财困危机。兄弟情深，多禄为救家业，主动答应亲事。谁料公主过门后尽显骄横跋扈本色，要求金家上下向她行君臣之礼，金家至高的精神领袖金太夫人(李香琴)也难逃一劫，公主的心腹侍婢司徒银屏(陈法拉)更不可一世，尊卑不分，连官媒丁有维(马国明)也不放眼内；金家各人不甘受屈，合力反抗，但金家出名的大力丫环吴四德(钟嘉欣)却倒戈相向，与公主站在同一阵线。公主斗驸马，叁合叁离，各施各法，最后更闹上皇宫，要由太宗亲自平息风波……娶得皇帝女，当然想夫凭妻贵；但娶着这位野蛮公主，又岂能百忍成金？

programme.title: 法言人
programme.desc: 金秉信(马国明饰)本是法律系高材生，却因一次冤狱而决定开启法律行政人员之路。凭借八面玲珑的处事手腕，秉信逐渐建立「金师爷」的金漆招牌。金师爷任职的律师楼突然面临倒闭，他运用人脉化解危局，还获律师田佑家(林夏薇饰)、庾国栋(黄嘉乐饰)加盟共事，并与大状马玮雄(张颕康饰)组成新的法律界「最强CP」，解决各宗错综复杂的案件。及后，金师爷竟再度成为犯人栏内的被告，纵得叁位知心好友全力支持，庭上仍处下风。到底金师爷一方最终能否逆转官司，继续以法律发言，为公义发声？

programme.title: 天命
programme.desc: 和珅(陈展鹏)相中皇子永琰(谭俊彦)为皇帝。乾隆驾崩后，嘉庆帝说服和珅儿子丰绅殷德(何广沛)以及心腹福长安(陈山聪)倒戈，意图歼灭和珅及其党羽。然而和珅早有对策，不但化解嘉庆攻击；更反客为主，揭出皇贵妃(李施嬅)秘密，令嘉庆腹背受敌！_x000D__x000D_和珅二夫人长媚(姚子羚)和红颜知己豆蔻(唐诗咏)亦分头行事，令嘉庆亲弟永璘(张颕康)与之反目成仇，而白莲教也在江湖上兴风作浪，令嘉庆陷入绝境。岂料天命难违……

programme.title: 公主嫁到
programme.desc: 刁蛮任性的昭阳公主(佘诗曼)为避嫁吐蕃急招驸马，一代金店掌舵人丁来喜(关菊英)主动送上门，因二儿子金多禄(陈豪)及叁儿子金多寿(黄浩然)均属单身，希望藉此解决金店面临的财困危机。兄弟情深，多禄为救家业，主动答应亲事。谁料公主过门后尽显骄横跋扈本色，要求金家上下向她行君臣之礼，金家至高的精神领袖金太夫人(李香琴)也难逃一劫，公主的心腹侍婢司徒银屏(陈法拉)更不可一世，尊卑不分，连官媒丁有维(马国明)也不放眼内；金家各人不甘受屈，合力反抗，但金家出名的大力丫环吴四德(钟嘉欣)却倒戈相向，与公主站在同一阵线。公主斗驸马，叁合叁离，各施各法，最后更闹上皇宫，要由太宗亲自平息风波……娶得皇帝女，当然想夫凭妻贵；但娶着这位野蛮公主，又岂能百忍成金？

programme.title: 法言人
programme.desc: 金秉信(马国明饰)本是法律系高材生，却因一次冤狱而决定开启法律行政人员之路。凭借八面玲珑的处事手腕，秉信逐渐建立「金师爷」的金漆招牌。金师爷任职的律师楼突然面临倒闭，他运用人脉化解危局，还获律师田佑家(林夏薇饰)、庾国栋(黄嘉乐饰)加盟共事，并与大状马玮雄(张颕康饰)组成新的法律界「最强CP」，解决各宗错综复杂的案件。及后，金师爷竟再度成为犯人栏内的被告，纵得叁位知心好友全力支持，庭上仍处下风。到底金师爷一方最终能否逆转官司，继续以法律发言，为公义发声？

programme.title: 天命
programme.desc: 和珅(陈展鹏)相中皇子永琰(谭俊彦)为皇帝。乾隆驾崩后，嘉庆帝说服和珅儿子丰绅殷德(何广沛)以及心腹福长安(陈山聪)倒戈，意图歼灭和珅及其党羽。然而和珅早有对策，不但化解嘉庆攻击；更反客为主，揭出皇贵妃(李施嬅)秘密，令嘉庆腹背受敌！_x000D__x000D_和珅二夫人长媚(姚子羚)和红颜知己豆蔻(唐诗咏)亦分头行事，令嘉庆亲弟永璘(张颕康)与之反目成仇，而白莲教也在江湖上兴风作浪，令嘉庆陷入绝境。岂料天命难违……

programme.title: 酒店风云
programme.desc: 酒店大亨王玉廷离世后，王家随即掀起一场争产战，叁子启杰(吴卓羲)离家出走，杰母遭两位同父异母的兄长迫走。更甚者，杰此时发现父亲早已将名下酒店股份转给了一个名叫高峰(马德钟)的人！_x000D__x000D_ 原来峰是为报仇而来，誓要将酒店得到手。危城告急，叁兄弟将个人恩怨放下，更不惜拉拢对王家产业一直虎视眈眈的舅父郑永发(姜大伟)连手对付峰。惟峰为人心狠手辣，众人被逐一打垮。_x000D__x000D_ 峰在王氏集团的地位稳如泰山之际，赫然发现女友顾碧琦(郭可盈)走近自己原来别有用心……

programme.title: 酒店风云
programme.desc: 酒店大亨王玉廷离世后，王家随即掀起一场争产战，叁子启杰(吴卓羲)离家出走，杰母遭两位同父异母的兄长迫走。更甚者，杰此时发现父亲早已将名下酒店股份转给了一个名叫高峰(马德钟)的人！_x000D__x000D_ 原来峰是为报仇而来，誓要将酒店得到手。危城告急，叁兄弟将个人恩怨放下，更不惜拉拢对王家产业一直虎视眈眈的舅父郑永发(姜大伟)连手对付峰。惟峰为人心狠手辣，众人被逐一打垮。_x000D__x000D_ 峰在王氏集团的地位稳如泰山之际，赫然发现女友顾碧琦(郭可盈)走近自己原来别有用心……

programme.title: 酒店风云
programme.desc: 酒店大亨王玉廷离世后，王家随即掀起一场争产战，叁子启杰(吴卓羲)离家出走，杰母遭两位同父异母的兄长迫走。更甚者，杰此时发现父亲早已将名下酒店股份转给了一个名叫高峰(马德钟)的人！_x000D__x000D_ 原来峰是为报仇而来，誓要将酒店得到手。危城告急，叁兄弟将个人恩怨放下，更不惜拉拢对王家产业一直虎视眈眈的舅父郑永发(姜大伟)连手对付峰。惟峰为人心狠手辣，众人被逐一打垮。_x000D__x000D_ 峰在王氏集团的地位稳如泰山之际，赫然发现女友顾碧琦(郭可盈)走近自己原来别有用心……

programme.title: 酒店风云
programme.desc: 酒店大亨王玉廷离世后，王家随即掀起一场争产战，叁子启杰(吴卓羲)离家出走，杰母遭两位同父异母的兄长迫走。更甚者，杰此时发现父亲早已将名下酒店股份转给了一个名叫高峰(马德钟)的人！_x000D__x000D_ 原来峰是为报仇而来，誓要将酒店得到手。危城告急，叁兄弟将个人恩怨放下，更不惜拉拢对王家产业一直虎视眈眈的舅父郑永发(姜大伟)连手对付峰。惟峰为人心狠手辣，众人被逐一打垮。_x000D__x000D_ 峰在王氏集团的地位稳如泰山之际，赫然发现女友顾碧琦(郭可盈)走近自己原来别有用心……

programme.title: 味想天开
programme.desc: 大唐盛世，丁一山因拥有「金舌头」成为「地狱食评家」，与名厨盖兆天亦敌亦友，还同时爱上爽朗胡姬石柔，遂互斗厨艺，「味」分高下……一山无意间发现自己身世，原来生父含冤而死，兆天父子也有嫌疑，如何为父雪冤？

programme.title: 公主嫁到
programme.desc: 刁蛮任性的昭阳公主(佘诗曼)为避嫁吐蕃急招驸马，一代金店掌舵人丁来喜(关菊英)主动送上门，因二儿子金多禄(陈豪)及叁儿子金多寿(黄浩然)均属单身，希望藉此解决金店面临的财困危机。兄弟情深，多禄为救家业，主动答应亲事。谁料公主过门后尽显骄横跋扈本色，要求金家上下向她行君臣之礼，金家至高的精神领袖金太夫人(李香琴)也难逃一劫，公主的心腹侍婢司徒银屏(陈法拉)更不可一世，尊卑不分，连官媒丁有维(马国明)也不放眼内；金家各人不甘受屈，合力反抗，但金家出名的大力丫环吴四德(钟嘉欣)却倒戈相向，与公主站在同一阵线。公主斗驸马，叁合叁离，各施各法，最后更闹上皇宫，要由太宗亲自平息风波……娶得皇帝女，当然想夫凭妻贵；但娶着这位野蛮公主，又岂能百忍成金？

programme.title: 法言人
programme.desc: 金秉信(马国明饰)本是法律系高材生，却因一次冤狱而决定开启法律行政人员之路。凭借八面玲珑的处事手腕，秉信逐渐建立「金师爷」的金漆招牌。金师爷任职的律师楼突然面临倒闭，他运用人脉化解危局，还获律师田佑家(林夏薇饰)、庾国栋(黄嘉乐饰)加盟共事，并与大状马玮雄(张颕康饰)组成新的法律界「最强CP」，解决各宗错综复杂的案件。及后，金师爷竟再度成为犯人栏内的被告，纵得叁位知心好友全力支持，庭上仍处下风。到底金师爷一方最终能否逆转官司，继续以法律发言，为公义发声？

programme.title: 天命
programme.desc: 和珅(陈展鹏)相中皇子永琰(谭俊彦)为皇帝。乾隆驾崩后，嘉庆帝说服和珅儿子丰绅殷德(何广沛)以及心腹福长安(陈山聪)倒戈，意图歼灭和珅及其党羽。然而和珅早有对策，不但化解嘉庆攻击；更反客为主，揭出皇贵妃(李施嬅)秘密，令嘉庆腹背受敌！_x000D__x000D_和珅二夫人长媚(姚子羚)和红颜知己豆蔻(唐诗咏)亦分头行事，令嘉庆亲弟永璘(张颕康)与之反目成仇，而白莲教也在江湖上兴风作浪，令嘉庆陷入绝境。岂料天命难违……

programme.desc: The Thomas & Uber Cup are the pinnacle of international team badminton, bringing together the world's top nations to battle for the prestigious titles. The Thomas Cup was first staged in 1948-49, and the Uber Cup was added for the first time in 1956-7. The Thomas Cup is the prize awarded for the World Men's Team Championships, while the Uber Cup is the prize for the World Women's Team Championships.

programme.desc: The FA Cup Highlights Show provides a comprehensive look back at the weekend's FA Cup action.

programme.title: Samudra Cinta
programme.desc: The love story between Ocean and Cinta, which had always quarreled before. Gradually, they became friends and slowly grew in love between them. But a secret between the Cinta family and the Samudra family makes their relationship complicated because there is a big secret about Cinta that can ruin their relationship.

programme.title: CINTA 2 PILIHAN
programme.desc: Fathir and Sukma are a married couple who live a simple but happy life. Until finally, their beloved daughter Zahra is diagnosed with a serious illness in the midst of their family's financial difficulties. At the same time, Fathir accidentally meets his ex-girlfriend Clara.

programme.title: SURAT KALENG UNTUK MANTAN
programme.desc: Dito (Ridho Ilahi) and Dewi (Masayu Clara) fall in love, but their parents are at war: Dewi sells mung bean porridge while Dito sells chicken porridge. Their families want to marry them off to wealthy suitors, but the couple chooses to fight for their love, documenting their dreams and romance in letters hidden inside a tin can.

programme.title: DEWI RINDU
programme.desc: Dewi is a girl with big dreams. She is determined to become successful and lift her family out of economic hardship. But who would have thought that her beautiful dream would be shattered and she would have to face the bitter reality of being pregnant out of wedlock.

programme.title: Neng Ayam Sederhana Tapi Bikin Warga Nyaman
programme.desc: After his acting contract is terminated due to a scandal with a co-star, Fadi (Indra Evans) retreats to his mother’s village for a break. There, he meets Naura (Rachquel Nesia), a legendary 'poultry queen' who runs the most successful chicken and egg business in town.

programme.title: Samudra Cinta
programme.desc: The love story between Ocean and Cinta, which had always quarreled before. Gradually, they became friends and slowly grew in love between them. But a secret between the Cinta family and the Samudra family makes their relationship complicated because there is a big secret about Cinta that can ruin their relationship.

programme.title: Dua Hati Sarangheyo To SarangBeo
programme.desc: Keni (Fendy Chow) is forced into an unusual disguise: he must pose as a Korean Idol to save a 'Meet and Greet' event organized by Erika. Reluctantly, Keni steps into the spotlight, leading to a series of comedic and high-pressure situations.

programme.title: DEWI RINDU
programme.desc: Dewi is a girl with big dreams. She is determined to become successful and lift her family out of economic hardship. But who would have thought that her beautiful dream would be shattered and she would have to face the bitter reality of being pregnant out of wedlock.

programme.title: Mba Mba, Bagi Tutornya Dong Suhu
programme.desc: Upon arriving in Jakarta, Tisa (Adzwa Aurell) is falsely accused of being a pickpocket by Dul (Cakrawala Airawan). Later, Tisa rescues Maya from thugs, and as a thank-you, Maya invites her to stay over. The next morning, Tisa is shocked to find that the grumpy Dul is actually Maya’s older brother.

programme.title: Samudra Cinta
programme.desc: The love story between Ocean and Cinta, which had always quarreled before. Gradually, they became friends and slowly grew in love between them. But a secret between the Cinta family and the Samudra family makes their relationship complicated because there is a big secret about Cinta that can ruin their relationship.

programme.title: Tuhan Ijinkan Aku Berjodoh Sama Cowok Lele
programme.desc: Indri (Chantiq Schagerl) dreams of winning a roller-skating competition, but her path takes a detour when she meets Jojo (Christ Laurent), a catfish farmer. Jojo is haunted by a past breakup, and Indri find herself entangled in a mission to help him find his true love once again.

programme.title: CINTA 2 PILIHAN
programme.desc: Fathir and Sukma are a married couple who live a simple but happy life. Until finally, their beloved daughter Zahra is diagnosed with a serious illness in the midst of their family's financial difficulties. At the same time, Fathir accidentally meets his ex-girlfriend Clara.

programme.title: TAK ADA ROTAN RINDU MENJADI
programme.desc: Ridwan (Rendy Kjaernett) refuses to join his mother’s rattan business, choosing to work elsewhere. After a fierce argument with a naive village girl named Sumi (Faye Nicole Jones) at a bus terminal, fate intervenes when Sumi saves Ridwan’s mother. Impressed, his mother hires Sumi, forcing a reluctant Ridwan to work alongside the girl he once called a thief.

programme.title: DEWI RINDU
programme.desc: Dewi is a girl with big dreams. She is determined to become successful and lift her family out of economic hardship. But who would have thought that her beautiful dream would be shattered and she would have to face the bitter reality of being pregnant out of wedlock.

programme.title: Gak Pengen Jadi Ipar Pengennya Jadi Pacar
programme.desc: Wini (Indah Nicole) accidentally crashes her bike into Dito (Hardi Fadhillah), causing an 'injury' to his sensitive area. Feeling responsible for his future, Wini tries to match her sister with Dito. However, she soon realizes her own heart objects, she is secretly falling for the man she’s trying to marry off.

programme.title: REBUT PACAR SAHABAT? ASIAAAAP!
programme.desc: Ara (Debi Sagita) is about to get married, but suddenly her best friend faints because she doesn't want Ara to marry her dream guy, Joni (Aditya Suryo). In the end, because she loves her best friend, Ara runs away to Sam's (Fauzan Nasrul) car. Ara is the daughter of a poor widow who works as a maid. She tries to steal her best friend's boyfriend, who is also the son of her mother's employer, using all sorts of funny methods, and eventually tries to reunite them.

programme.title: Tergila Gila Sama Kamu Core

programme.title: The Gala
programme.desc: It's Valentine's Day, and Lieutenant Grey gives Tim and Lucy an unromantic assignment, while John and Celina track down a missing girl. Later, the team sharpens up for a charity gala where multiple relationships come to a head.

programme.title: Hot Tea Hot Tea Kalau Jatuh Hati
programme.desc: Desperate for a solution, Zulfa and Kevin turn to a matchmaking agency, only to be betrayed by their respective partners. Since they both need a significant other to complete a mission, the agency suggests they team up and fake a relationship. However, the game changes when Kevin meets Zulfa’s mother, who happens to be a close friend of his own parents. Now, their mothers are joining forces to force them into a real marriage.

programme.title: Trio Baperan Kena Polusi Cinta
programme.desc: Three young men named Malik, Jajang, and Jarwo are hired to work at a company owned by a beautiful woman named Dina. All three seem to be smitten with their boss's charm. However, Malik, who is known as a playboy, secretly hurts Dina's younger sister, Monic. Dina, as the older sister, does not remain silent. She secretly takes revenge by making the three men fall in love with her and then ignoring their love.

programme.title: INDONESIA FOOD ADVENTURE
programme.desc: Discover the rich and diverse flavors of Indonesian cuisine - from traditional dishes and street food to heartwarming homemade meals.

programme.title: JALAN - JALAN S2
programme.desc: A program that provides information about interesting places for vacations.

programme.title: BINTANG PANTURA 6
programme.desc: Bintang Pantura 6 is back! The legendary 'Juragan' Soimah, joined by her trusty assistant Nunung and business partner Inul Daratista, is on a mission to find 40 talented contestants. Who will make the cut and finally perform on the stage of their dreams?

programme.title: Cinta Kadang Gulali Ke Bawah Kadang Gulali Keatas
programme.desc: Ruby (Shanice Margaretha) has to replace her mother, who sells cotton candy in front of the school. While serving a girl, Ruby is accused by Angkasa (Fero Walandouw) of being part of a child abduction syndicate. Ruby refuses to accept such accusations and defends herself.

programme.title: Belum Mantan Masih Demen
programme.desc: Feeling abandoned by Sigit (Kiki Farrel) after seeing him post videos with a beautiful girl, Maya (Shanice Margaretha) decides enough is enough. She embarks on a mission to completely transform her appearance and behavior, determined to become the kind of woman who can capture the heart of any handsome man.

programme.title: iCarly Awards
programme.desc: Carly, Sam, and Freddie present iCarly Awards for best user-generated content, giving the awards to the winners live on the web show. Spencer enlists European swimsuit models to help him make the awards statuettes.

programme.title: The Great Ping-Pong Scam
programme.desc: Tori discovers that her friends have been secretly going to a fancy restaurant instead of playing in an annual ping pong tournament.

programme.title: #MagicATM
programme.desc: Sam notices that Cat has been spending lots of money. When she asks where it's coming from, Cat takes Sam to a "Magic ATM" that gives her free money. Sam worries that this might not be legal.

programme.title: Mutant Battle Arena
programme.desc: Raph's brothers just don't get him. He NEEDS to fight! He's good at it too, according to his new trainer Spuds. But even though they don't see eye to eye, the Turtles must work together to stop a rampaging Bebop and Rocksteady from wrecking the city!

programme.title: Mutantweight Title Bout
programme.desc: All of Raph's dreams have come true as he fights Rocksteady, Bebop, and Mondo Gecko in the underground Mutant Battle Arena. But he doesn't realize he's walked right into a trap set by Kitsune and her street gang, the Purple Dragons!

programme.title: Captain Pipsqueak/Plane to Sea
programme.desc: Plankton joins the League of E.V.I.L. // SpongeBob and Patrick take Squidward on a plane to a tropical resort.

programme.title: Abandon Twits / Wallhalla
programme.desc: The Krusty Krew builds a boat for their penny-pinching captain. // SpongeBob discovers a crazed castaway living in his walls.

programme.title: Mar-Snoop / Canteen Carnage
programme.desc: On her quest to get her own Marsupilami, Bibi encounters a Jaguar which scares her enough to give up the hunt. // Marcel gets a job as the school chef after Jade causes the usual one to quit.

programme.title: Bucket Pants / A Best Too Far
programme.desc: Best and Bester decide Grumpy Pants needs more excitement and take him to have the most extreme cup of tea ever. // In this year's Capture the Flag contest Best listens to other people's ideas even if they haven't got a war room.

programme.title: Spoiler Alert / Something Fishy
programme.desc: The twins go to great lengths to protect Best's enjoyment of his book and realize spoilers aren't so bad after all. // Best and Bester may have jumped the line for the new fish restaurant, but once inside things take a dramatic turn.

programme.title: The Patrick Show Cashes In / The Star Games
programme.desc: In this ad-packed variety episode, The Patrick Show sells merchandise in order to fund its second season. // Patrick forces his entire family to participate in a series of different game show challenges.

programme.title: Super Stars / Now Museum, Now You Don't
programme.desc: In an alternate universe, the Star family is a team of superheroes, or at least they think they are. // Cecil works a new temp job as a security guard at Lady Upturn's art museum.

programme.title: Knock Knock, Who's There? / Pat Hearts Squid
programme.desc: SpongeBob watches Mr. Krabs's house while he's away, so he takes extreme measures to make sure no one breaks in. // Squidward is forced to room with Patrick, but his domineering demeanor rubs off on Patrick more than he'd like.

programme.title: Mimic Madness
programme.desc: SpongeBob learns that "imitation is the sincerest form of flattery" - too bad no one told him how to stop!

programme.title: Faulty Powers
programme.desc: After a training accident causes a glitch in Chloe's powers, Max and Phoebe look for a cure. After Max thinks he's solved the issue, he allows Chloe to attend a party with friends, but his treatment creates brand new powers Chloe can't control.

programme.title: Bilsky's Billions
programme.desc: When Mitch Bilsky enrolls at SWAG, Headmaster Ray and Danger Force use a combination of patience and powers to help him achieve the impossible and graduate high school.

programme.title: The Space Rock
programme.desc: Trouble follows Henry home from his superhero life when a piece of rock from outer space turns out to be more than it seems.

programme.title: Jeers for Fears / Tea Tale Heart
programme.desc: After agreeing to go to The Royal Woods House of Terror, Linc and Clyde have to toughen up and face their fears. // Lola discovers Lucy has an old, fragile doll and decides she must borrow it - no matter what Lucy says.

programme.title: Predict Ability / Driving Ambition
programme.desc: After discovering he has rituals, Lincoln worries he's predictable and vows to change it up. // When Lori finds out that the golf coach from her dream college is coming to see her play, she develops the yips.

programme.title: Hand-Me-Downer
programme.desc: After Lincoln gets a pink hand-me-down bike from Lori, he borrows Lynn's cool BMX bike without telling her.

programme.title: The Dirty Bubble Bass / Sheldon SquarePants
programme.desc: Bubble Bass and the Dirty Bubble team up to become Bikini Bottom's nastiest nefarious nuisance. // Plankton joins the SquarePants family in the hope of becoming closer to SpongeBob (and the secret formula).

programme.title: Sammy Suckerfish / Big League Bob
programme.desc: SpongeBob meets a magical fish. // SpongeBob cooks in the big leagues.

programme.title: Stuck in an Elevator

programme.title: Jade the Influencer / Restaurant Review

programme.title: Left Holding the Bag
programme.desc: Eager to become Master Criminals, Lil & Jack help Chuck with his "dirty laundry". But are they ready for a life of crime?

programme.title: Unreal Estate / Code Yellow
programme.desc: When SpongeBob thinks he's allergic to his pineapple, Squidward offers to help find him a new home. // Squidward is getting a nose job at the local hospital, and SpongeBob tags along as moral support.

programme.title: Shell Games
programme.desc: Patrick discovers that the rock he lives under is actually a sea turtle who overslept.

programme.title: Jade the Influencer / Restaurant Review
programme.desc: Bibi goes live, but when she's not getting enough likes Twister steps in to help, and is almost unmasked. // Gran Gran's convinced the Chahuta and won't impress a food critic, so tries to change things.

programme.title: Stage Plight

programme.title: Prison Break / Canyon Valley Film Festival
programme.desc: When Jack and Lil are grounded by Will and Min, who are then grounded by Halmoni, the family team up to escape their punishment. // Canyon Valley hosts a festival and Jack's excited to enter, until the pressure to deliver a masterpiece gets to him.

programme.title: Cruel Summer
programme.desc: Max and Phoebe are working well as a team, until he is accused of committing crimes and Phoebe must apprehend him. Now on the lam, Max learns that the Mastermind's henchman is secretly controlling his actions via a chip in his neck.

programme.title: The Rock Box Dump
programme.desc: When a report comes out that Kid Danger's super power is actually an illness, Kid Danger has to convince Swellview that it is a huge misunderstanding.

programme.title: iPie
programme.desc: When Carly, Sam, and Spencer bring Freddie to their favorite pie shop, they learn that its proprietor has passed away. Worse more, it appears that his recipes may be lost forever.

programme.title: The Birthweek Song
programme.desc: Tori struggles to find the perfect birthday gift for Trina, then decides to write her sister a song as a present. An ungrateful Trina turns the song into cash by selling it, enraging Tori.

programme.title: Judge Lay Lay
programme.desc: The Alexander family looks to Lay Lay to cast the deciding vote on family decisions, but the newfound power goes to her head, and one ruling causes a rift between her and Sadie.

programme.title: April Fools Rules / Cereal Offender
programme.desc: Every April Fool's Day, Luan pranks the entire household, but this year, Lincoln has a plan to not get pranked. // The Loud kids make a trip to the supermarket to do the grocery shopping for Mom, but Lincoln has other plans.

programme.title: Leave No Van Behind / Sponsor Tripped
programme.desc: Vanzilla breaks down. // Lynn and friends enjoy free perks around Royal Wood.

programme.title: Sad, Single, and Stranded / A Waste of a Perfect Summer Day
programme.desc: Will & Min show Jack around to help him find a good story. Lily spills boba in Jack's suitcase and tries to hide the evidence. // Jack tries to find "the big picture" as Lily shows him how to spend a perfect summer day in Canyon Valley.

programme.title: Wary Gary / Pinned
programme.desc: SpongeBob goes to extreme lengths to trick Gary into going to the vet. // SpongeBob become desperate when he accidentally gets pinned under his exercise equipment and must wait for help to arrive.

programme.title: Patty-Poo / Swaptoberfest
programme.desc: Patrick spawns an adorable mini-Patrick who quickly becomes the star of the show (until he outgrows the role). // The Star family celebrates the Klopnodian holiday Swaptoberfest by swapping identities with each other.

programme.title: To Dad and Back
programme.desc: Patrick ventures inside Cecil to learn how the body works.

programme.title: Cheer Pressure / Stroke of Luck
programme.desc: Lori becomes a celebrity at school when she hits a hole-in-one on a notoriously difficult course. // The cheerleaders challenge Lynn and her teammates to a 'cheer off' when Lynn dismisses them as athletes.

programme.title: Space Jammed / Crown and Dirty
programme.desc: Annoyed by Leni's intrusive babysitting, Lisa accidentally blasts herself and Todd into space. // Lola tries to whip Mom into tip-top pageant condition for a Mother-Daughter pageant.

programme.title: Prison Break / Canyon Valley Film Festival
programme.desc: When Jack and Lil are grounded by Will and Min, who are then grounded by Halmoni, the family team up to escape their punishment. // Canyon Valley hosts a festival and Jack's excited to enter, until the pressure to deliver a masterpiece gets to him.

programme.title: Woori World / Finding FlamingoFan85
programme.desc: The family prepares for war, AKA a trip to the local Asian market. After their battle to procure a rare cookie, Jack feels more part of the family. // The Groom & Board gets a bad review. Lily tries to find the culprit and "correct the record.

programme.title: Mall Girl Pearl / Two Thumbs Down
programme.desc: Pearl gets a job to be cool like her friends, but the only store that's hiring is the lamest store at the mall! // SpongeBob loses the use of his thumbs, and must get them back in working order before his entire life falls apart.

programme.desc: Mica's Marsup journal ends up in Acu's bag so he has to get it back before his friend finds it. // Twister, is fed up of Hope and Punch's pranks, so he builds his own cardboard house which Stan finds.

programme.desc: Luan wakes up with a pimple on the day of her first date with Benny, so she turns to the siblings for help.

programme.title: Superman
programme.desc: This star-packed extravaganza brings the comic book legend to the big screen where an infant superhero is sent to Earth just as his home planet, Krypton, explodes.

programme.title: What A Girl Wants
programme.desc: Free-spirited teenager Amanda Bynes brings a breath of fresh air to the stuffy world of her long-lost father, Colin Firth.

programme.title: Young Adult
programme.desc: When things are no longer what they used to be, a former prom queen and her friend realise that it is time for them to grow up.

programme.title: Into The Wild
programme.desc: A top student and athlete leaves his middle-class life to venture into Alaska, only to meet people who will eventually shape his values and life.

programme.title: Dracula Untold
programme.desc: The origin story of the man who became Dracula. Vlad III, Prince of Wallachia, enters into a Faustian pact to save his people and becomes inflicted with an insatiable thirst for human blood.

programme.title: Beetlejuice
programme.desc: An uncontrollable demonic wraith mixes the quick and dead with a laugh and a fright in this comic fantasy.

programme.title: What A Girl Wants
programme.desc: Free-spirited teenager Amanda Bynes brings a breath of fresh air to the stuffy world of her long-lost father, Colin Firth.

programme.title: Downton Abbey
programme.desc: A royal visit from the King and Queen of England unleashes scandal, romance and intrigue that leave the future of Downton hanging in the balance.

programme.title: Chocolat
programme.desc: A woman opens a chocolate shop in a French town and creates confections that inspire the straitlaced villagers to abandon themselves to temptation and happiness.

programme.title: Humane
programme.desc: HUMANE takes place over a single day, mere months after a global ecological collapse has forced world leaders to reduce the earth’s population.

programme.title: Death Of A Unicorn
programme.desc: Father-Daughter duo Elliott and Ridley hit a unicorn with their car and bring it to the wilderness retreat of a mega-wealthy pharmaceutical CEO.

programme.title: Axis Mundi
programme.desc: In this HBO Original series, a prominent family meets their new neighbours in the only Departure-free town in America.

programme.title: Weapons
programme.desc: All but one child from the same class vanishes leaving a community questioning who or what is behind their disappearance.

programme.title: The Second Civil War
programme.desc: A HBO Original Movie about how a simple immigration issue spins wildly out of control for those involved, ranging from the US President to a news producer.

programme.title: A Matter Of Geography
programme.desc: Looking for a fresh start, Kevin, Nora, Jill and Lily leave Mapleton for the 'Miracle' town of Jarden, TX.

programme.title: John Mccain: For Whom The Bell Tolls
programme.desc: Explore the life of Sen. John McCain in this illuminating profile of one of the most influential forces in modern American politics.

programme.title: North Country
programme.desc: A single mother retaliates against her male co-workers in an iron mine, leading to the first class-action lawsuit for sexual discrimination in America.

programme.title: The Immortal Life Of Henrietta Lacks
programme.desc: Based on the book of the same name, this HBO Original film tells the true story of a woman whose cells were used to create the first immortal human cell line.

programme.title: Imagine That
programme.desc: When a successful executive suffers a crisis of confidence and his career is at stake, he finds the solution to his problems in his daughter’s imaginary world.

programme.title: Everyday People
programme.desc: The closure of a beloved New York City diner deeply affects its employees and neighbors in this HBO Original Movie.

programme.title: Ferrell Takes The Field
programme.desc: In this HBO Comedy Special, Will Ferrell takes the field and plays every position for ten different baseball teams over ten days.

programme.title: Millers In Marriage
programme.desc: Three siblings navigate life’s next chapter in this heartfelt drama about love and second chances.

programme.title: Episode 8
programme.desc: A comedy set on a college campus centering on an author's (Steve Carell) complicated relationship with his daughter (Charly Clive).

programme.title: Episode 6
programme.desc: Explores the madness of the television world and the bravery of a tragic actress as she struggles to keep her career afloat while balancing her personal life

programme.title: Episode 3
programme.desc: Euphoria follows a group of high school students as they navigate love and friendships in a world of drugs, sex, trauma, and social media.

programme.title: Mission to CATurn
programme.desc: When CatRat gets stuck on planet Caturn, it's up to Gabby and Pandy to go save him. DJ Catnip teaches them a song to remember how to get there and Baby Box helps them make jetpacks so they can zip around. In the Cat-osphere, they take a twirl through Space Swirls and zip through the Supergallactic Doughnut Hole and even meet DJ Catnip's cousin, DJ Comet! For the Cat of the Day Segment, Baby Box and DJ Comet show us how to craft a papier-mâché Caturn.

programme.title: Why Monkeys Swing In The Trees
programme.desc: You see there was a time when Monkey used to play on the ground and he loved to wind up Crocodile. One day the Big Rains came and Monkey got stranded up the Mango Tree. Nasty Crocodile promised to take him to dry land…. But only in exchange for one thing…. His HEART! Monkey tricked Crocodile and when Crocodile found out that Monkey swapped his heart for a measley mango, he chased Monkey up a tree.

programme.title: Why Tickbird Sits On Hippos Back
programme.desc: You see there was a time when Tickbird didn't sit on Hippo's back, infact they weren't friends at all! Tickbird was sick of Hippo splashing all the time. One day tiny Tickbird challenges big Hippo to a contest… who can drink the most water in a single gulp! Tickbird outwits Hippo by using the tides and from that day she is allowed to sit on Hippo's back and pick off all the yummy ticks she can eat! Tales from Africa.

programme.title: Postman Pat And The Runaway Bath
programme.desc: Pat must deliver an old bath tub to Pencaster Lighthouse. But when he goes to collect it from Thompson Ground, the bath ends up rolling away into Greendale with Jess inside! When Pat catches up with the bath he finds PC Selby about to impound it for being an un-road-worthy vehicle. Pat explains it's a Special Delivery and at last gets on his way.

programme.title: Postman Pat And The Loch Ness Monster
programme.desc: Mrs Goggins is on holiday, so Sarah Gilbertson is looking after her dog Bonnie. She calls in on Pat and proves she has zero control over the dog. But there is only time for Jess to roll his eyes before Pat is called out on a special delivery - it's urgent! He has to deliver the RADARSCOPE (designed by Ted) to Mrs Goggins, who is up in Scotland! Pat has no idea what a radarscope is and neither does Ben. But they know what urgent means, so they spring into action and load it into Pat's jet plane.

programme.title: Simply The Best
programme.desc: Molecom is very grateful to Plugger for rescuing him after yet another of Flash's pranks. But Plugger is soon frustrated by Molecom's attempts to help… Meanwhile, Roary is trying hard to beat his best lap time.

programme.title: Cici Wins The Day
programme.desc: Cici is fed up with never winning and decides not to take part in the race that day. Can Roary persuade her to change her mind?

programme.title: Heavy Loader
programme.desc: Roary takes Loada on a jaunt to the beach… only to discover that sand and lorries don't mix too well!

programme.title: Testing Time For Maxi
programme.desc: PC Pete and Nick are up at Silver hatch giving the cars their road tests. Is Maxi really going to be as good as he says he is or will he be unpleasantly surprised?

programme.title: The Case Of The Pocket's Present
programme.desc: Fuse asks Noddy to take a present to the Pockets. But when Noddy arrives at the Treehouse, he discovers he's carrying an empty box. The present, whatever it was, has gone! Noddy must investigate: where is the Pockets' present? But how will he ever find it when he doesn't actually know what it is? It's going to take all his detecting skills to solve this one!

programme.title: The Case Of Fuse's New Game
programme.desc: When Fuse invites his friends to come for a playdate all they want to do is play his new computer game. But then suddenly the computer goes off. He soon discovers there's a power cut affecting the whole of Brickabuild. But who switched off the power? And why? Desperate to carry on with the game, Noddy decides to investigate: how can they play Fuse's new game?

programme.title: The Case of the Pirate's Treasure
programme.desc: Queen Sparklewings asks the Pirate Captain to do the first dance with her at the Queen's Dance. But when it's time to practise, the Captain can't come: someone's stolen their treasure! Noddy decides to help find the treasure so the Captain will still be able to dance. He needs to investigate: Who stole the Pirates' treasure?

programme.title: The Case Of The Empty Store
programme.desc: Clockwork Mouse leaves Carlton in charge of getting everything ready for the Builders' Parade. Carlton gratefully accepts Noddy's offer of help but doesn't want the Naughticorns helping too! But when Carlton goes to the Brickabuild Store for supplies, he's horrified to discover the store is empty. How will they get the parade ready now? And will Clockwork Mouse ever trust Carlton again? Noddy sets out to investigate: Who took all the stuff from the Brickabuild Store?

programme.title: A Cat-Tabulous Christmas
programme.desc: It's Christmas time in the dollhouse! After putting the final topper on the Christmas tree, Figgy the Elf calls and says that Santa Kitty needs help in his workshop, it's up to Gabby and Pandy to go help her out. After some toy fixing and boxing fun, Gabby and Pandy get to meet Santa Kitty and his Kitty reindeer and join him delivering presents to all their friends in the dollhouse.

programme.title: Fluffy Flufferton
programme.desc: Feline popstar sensation Fluffy Flufferton is performing a concert at the Dollhouse Hotel, and Gabby unboxes tickets to see her! Gabby meets Fluffy and discovers that she’s afraid to try new things because she doesn’t want to make mistakes-why mess with perfection? But with the help of the Gabby Cats, Fluffy learns how to fail fantastically and be the most fluff-tastic version of herself. For our Cat of the Day segment, DJ Catnip sings a song about the Dollhouse Hotel.

programme.title: Treasure Riders
programme.desc: When a swashbuckling adventurer named Waldondo comes to town, the Riders enthusiastically join him on a treasure hunt for a priceless gem.

programme.title: Puff Enuf
programme.desc: The Riders find a Puffertail and train her to join the family. She struggles to learn but soon finds herself with a chance to make a big rescue.

programme.title: Welcome to Harmony Harbor
programme.desc: Ari moves in to Harmony Harbor, but notices something strange involving a group of kids, a Noodle Truck chef and her pet squirrel. / After Ari discovers the secret of Team Zenko Go, he asks to join the crew. But first he must learn the importance of teamwork.

programme.title: Where’s The Party? / The Noisiest Night
programme.desc: When Marcus loses an invitation to a birthday party and doesn’t know where it will take place, the Dew Drops set out to find the location and get Marcus to the party on time. / When Harper can’t sleep because of a strange noise in her room, the Dews must figure out the source.
