programme.title: Gabby, I Shrunk the Kitties!
programme.desc: Gabby and Pandy accidentally get turned teeny-tiny when one of Mercat's potions spills. To get back to their normal size, they need to find the right ingredients to make a grow potion, which means going on an itty-bitty search through the dollhouse! For our Cat of the Day segment, Mercat shows us how to make sparkly, mermaid slime.

programme.title: It's Purrsday!
programme.desc: It's Purrsday, the happiest cat day of the year, and all the Gabby Cats have a special purrsday surprise. Gabby and Pandy make peekaboo kitty paper chains with Baby Box, decorate a Purrsday cake with Cakey, Gabby gets a special kitty makeover with Mercat, and everyone sings a Purrsday song with DJ Catnip. For the COTD, DJ Catnip shows us how to make a DJ Catnip purr-stick!

programme.title: Mom’s Birthday / Angry
programme.desc: Kelp and Scallop enlist Cruz’s help to perform a dance for Mom’s birthday. Though it’s hard at first, they learn to put their dolphin, unicorn, and narwhal powers together to create something special. / Kelp, Pixie, Ollie, and their friend Leroy try to help Juniper understand her angry feelings.

programme.title: Tuskist / Three Moon Festival
programme.desc: Scallop is afraid of her first "tuskist" appointment. Kelp helps her get through it with a song. / Fog rolls in, threatening Kelp’s first Three Moon Festival in Unicorn Land. Kelp and his friends use a combination of unicorn spark and the Kelp Way to create a new festival.

programme.title: Tag Team / Cattitude Adjustment
programme.desc: With a new family moving to town, Mayor Sniffington wants Pawston to look perfect. Tag and Scooch offer to help, but it's too many chores to do on their own, so Tag builds a robot to help. But when Frank and Beans catch wind of the robot, they try to swipe it so that it will do their personal chores. \ When Tag learns that Pawston's new fire chief is a cat, she leads a welcoming effort with the dogs of Pawston.

programme.title: Hocus Pocus / Furricane
programme.desc: When Tag and Scooch get a once-in-a-lifetime chance to learn magic from Muttfield, Tag cannot wait to be the star of the end-of-class show. When Scooch outshines Tag with his natural gift for magic, Tag gets jealous and attempts a master level trick that goes awry. \ The dogs are shedding their winter coats and it's the day of the big Pawston Picnic.

programme.title: Fake Ravine
programme.desc: When the Dinotrux settle together in the crater, D-Structs decides to go after their most important resource: the Reptools.

programme.title: Race To The Finish Part 2
programme.desc: Determined to save her family home, Lucky signs up to race as a wild card in Rosemead's elite Junior Cup. But winning it all won't be easy.

programme.title: Munk History / Happy Howl Day
programme.desc: Grug tries to solve the mystery of where Munk's family is /Eep refuses to join in when Ahhh! Valley celebrates their first holiday, "Howl Day"

programme.title: Snooty And The Beasts Part 1 & 2
programme.desc: After rescuing Kevin and almost having a first kiss, Eep sets up dangerous situations to recreate the moment; Grug and Snoot go on a rescue/mission

programme.title: Reign Of Fireworms
programme.desc: Fireworms invade Dragon's Edge, while Ruffnut and Tuffnut discover that they have an unexpected connection to the island.

programme.title: Crushing It
programme.desc: As a Rumblehorn wreaks havoc on Dragon's Edge, Hiccup seeks the help of Stoick - who forms an unexpected bond with the rampaging beast.

programme.title: The Knight's Fall - Part 2
programme.desc: Blade tells Po the truth about Alfie. The group chases after Klaus and Veruca in an epic snowy mountain chase, culminating in Po saving Blade’s life as the weasels take off with the gauntlet and the whip. Rukhmini reveals that she actually has the real whip in her staff, and she knows where to go to get the next one: India.

programme.title: The Liar and The Thief
programme.desc: The team arrives in India where an old friend of Rukhmini can supposedly give them a pendant that will lead to the next Tianshang weapon. But when they arrive, they find that Rukhmini’s hometown has changed a lot in the thirty years she’s been gone, and her old friend Diya might not be willing to help them.

programme.title: Abra-CAT-Dabra
programme.desc: Baby Box is learning to be a great magician and wants to pull a rabbit out of a hat. But when there's no rabbit to be found, Gabby, Pandy and Baby Box visit the other Gabby Cats for help. For the COTD, Baby Box, Gabby and Pandy sing the "Whoopsies!" Song.

programme.title: Easter Kitty Bunny
programme.desc: It’s Easter-time in the dollhouse! When Gabby unboxes an Easter basket with an orange egg inside, all the Gabby Cats want to know what’s inside, but when CatRat accidentally sends it rolling out of Kitty Fairy’s garden, Gabby and Pandy go on a springtime search through the Dollhouse to find it. Then, when the egg hatches, they meet Eggy, the Easter Kitty Bunny! For our Cat of the Day segment, Baby Box gets crafty.

programme.title: Dollhouse Detectives
programme.desc: There's a mystery in the dollhouse! When things start to mysteriously disappear around the dollhouse, Gabby and Pandy play detectives, using all their senses to find clues, follow them, and solve the mystery. For our COTD segment, CatRat and Baby Me-Owls show us how to make ice cube paints!

programme.title: Fugitive's Day Out
programme.desc: Boss Baby is framed for leaking info about the Stinkless Serum to PuppyCo and must flee on the run via Errand Day with the family

programme.title: El Apasionado Negocio de la Niñera
programme.desc: Frederic makes a play to take over the town's babysitters by instituting "senior sitting"

programme.title: Plushythingy
programme.desc: When Frederic Estes creates the cutest plushy ever that is the hottest toy in town, the field team must destroy the last remaining one but are powerless against its cuteness

programme.title: Captain Underpants and the Bombastic Blathering of Brainy Blabulous
programme.desc: When Krupp transfers to another school, George and Harold follow, only to find a bizarro version of Jerome Horwitz Elementary, where the teachers are nice and the kids are well-behaved. But no one's having any fun! George and Harold want to right this wrong with pranks and comics. But Krupp enlists Mr. Neamer (bizarro Meaner), who then super-enlargers his brain and becomes Brainy Blabulous, in order to stop the subversion of authority.

programme.title: Captain Underpants and the Crazy Caustic Spray of the Contagious Cruelius Sneezer
programme.desc: In order to spice up their field trip to Romeinday (an ancient Rome reenactment park), George and Harold trick Melvin into turning the bus into a time machine so they can travel to actual ancient Rome and be gladiators. After offending Caesar with their comic, the emperor is accidentally turned into Cruelius Sneezer and pursues the school group with all his might.

programme.title: Captain Underpants and the Trashy Tale of the Tumultuous Tubbadump
programme.desc: In honor of Dump Day in Piqua- celebrating the creation of the dump - George and Harold try to earn extra credit by creating a trash-alanche. But Melvin creates an invention to suck all the trash into another dimension. The plan backfires when Tubbadump, a trash-covered monster, emerges from that dimension for revenge on the trashmakers.

programme.title: The Patroness
programme.desc: Echo and Ms. Nowhere bust Cisco, Frostee, and Gary out of their cell. But Rafaela has already mind controlled Tony and Layla and taken them to drive for her in the favela race, allowing her to release her mind control formula on the crowd!

programme.title: Tchau, Uggos
programme.desc: Our team battles Rafaela’s mind-controlled crowd. They soon discover that Rafaela’s true plan is to steal the spy plane. Tony deduces that Rafaela isn’t doing all of this for the money - she’s doing it for family.

programme.title: The Giant Haboob
programme.desc: Cleve Kelso breaks Rafaela Moreno and a dangerous, cybernetic prisoner named Matsuo Mori from a high-security ice prison. Back in LA, Tony and the crew experience a major shake-up when Echo gets accepted to Ms. Nowhere’s spy training but Tony is rejected. While Tony is grappling with his identity crisis, Echo struggles to survive spy school, and Ms. Nowhere and Gary disappear in a massive North African storm during their hunt for Cleve. Echo must lead the Toretto crew and finish Ms.

programme.title: Twintuition
programme.desc: When the Twins journey to the Northern Markets to fix their prized mace, they end up stumbling onto a secret project by Viggo and the Dragon Hunters.

programme.title: Blindsided
programme.desc: A huge storm hits Dragon's Edge causing the Dragons to spook and run off but when Astrid is blinded, Hiccup must lead her to Stormfly.

programme.title: Shell Shocked Part 1
programme.desc: Hiccup doesn't know who to trust when Viggo and Ryker each tell him that the other has gone rogue, and is sidetracked when a new dragon attacks.

programme.title: A House Divided
programme.desc: As the countdown to the Eternal Night approaches, Jim is enlightened in the truth about himself.

programme.title: Jimhunters
programme.desc: When Jim's friends discover the Trollhunter has gone through a transformation, Jim will test his newly gained abilities.

programme.title: The Eternal Knight Pt. 1
programme.desc: The Eternal Night covers Arcadia in shadow leading to a long awaited fight between the Trollhunter and Gunmar130226

programme.title: The Gateway to The Desert
programme.desc: A mysterious figure helps Po escape the guards, so Po makes his way to a desert market, determined to prove Blade wrong for leaving him behind. But when he accidentally stumbles into Klaus and Veruca, he and Blade awkwardly reunite while giving chase, and work through their differences. But the mysterious figure has followed Po and tries to capture them, clearly a new threat to our team.

programme.title: The Lost City
programme.desc: With a map from the comic book, Po and Blade make the treacherous journey through the desert to the lost city, and once inside they find the guardian of the fire whip, Rukhmini. The mysterious figure, a stag named Colin, forges an uneasy alliance with Klaus and Veruca.

programme.title: The Last Guardian
programme.desc: In order to earn the fire whip, Po and Blade have to get themselves and Rukhmini out of a lost city with no exits, but Rukhimi’s not exactly who she says she is. Our villains’ alliance shatters when Colin realizes the weasels are mages with magical powers, and he leaves Klaus gravely injured.

programme.title: The Big Sleep
programme.desc: Aja and Krel travel into their parents’ memories in pursuit of Morando - and the truth about Gaylen’s Core. But when the King and Queen’s lives are jeopardized, a trusted ally makes a sacrifice that will change the team forever.

programme.title: Race to Trollmarket
programme.desc: With their parents nearly regenerated and Morando in pursuit of Gaylen’s Core, Aja, Krel, and Vex unite with Toby and Arrgh on a quest into the depths of Trollmarket to unearth the relic before it ends up in the wrong hands.

programme.title: A Glorious End, Part One
programme.desc: Armed with the power of Gaylen's Core, Morando's forces attack Arcadia as the Royals fight to protect their lives and their adopted Earth home.

programme.title: The Final Key
programme.desc: Ms. Nowhere tells the kids that the failed mission is over, but Tony isn’t ready to give up, and he’s determined to rescue Frostee. The crew goes rogue by deciding to steal the final key from Shashi and trade it for their friend.

programme.title: Ignition
programme.desc: Shashi finally reveals his master plan.

programme.title: The Key To The Strip
programme.desc: The kids battle Shashi in Las Vegas as Shashi tries to take down evil billionaire Cleve and use Skeleton Key to create a new world order. Frostee has a plan to get Skeleton Key offline, but it only gives Tony ten seconds to take Shashi out and save the world.

programme.title: Escape from L.A.
programme.desc: Tony and his crew have been working as spy racers in LA for a while now and are itching to go international. Whey they discover a mysterious man with a strange tattoo of a formula in a smuggling ring bust, Ms. Nowhere finally agrees to let them go to Rio to investigate the tattoo and the whereabouts of one of her agents who has gone dark - Layla Gray.

programme.title: That Sinking Feeling
programme.desc: Ms. Nowhere drops the kids off in Brazil and leaves to go on her own important mission, but things immediately go south for Tony and his crew. When the hauler and gear gets caught in quicksand, Tony needs to learn that a good leader knows when to accept help.

programme.title: Why Frog Croaks
programme.desc: You see there was a time when Frog didn't croak. Frog sang like a bird… and the birds didn't like it. Birds were the masters of song and that's the way it should be! So the birds trick poor old Frog into a singing duel and sing and sing and sing… until poor old Frog's voice is reduced to a rebbit. Tales from Africa.

programme.title: Why Spider Has A Tiny Waist
programme.desc: You see there was a time when Spider didn't have a tiny waist. She was all big and round… and did she like her food! One day greedy Spider hears of Four Feasts in Tinga Tinga and she wanted to go to them all! So she spun four threads and attached them to various animals going to the feasts. But the Monkeys, Frog, Hippo and the Bees all set off in different directions - North, South, East and West - and Spider's thread soon runs out.

programme.title: Postman Pat And The Clippy Claws
programme.desc: Pat has a very special delivery today! Micawber's claws need clipping and Pat needs to deliver not only the claw clippers but Amy the vet too! On the way to the lighthouse though they encounter all sorts of animals needing help today - from a poorly Bonnie with a cold to a fretful Pumpkin who doesn't want to take his horse pills!

programme.title: Postman Pat And The Sorting Machine
programme.desc: Pat and Jess are called to Cardiff to collect a new sorting machine when the Pencaster machine breaks down.

programme.title: Mum's The Word
programme.desc: Christine (Big Chris' mum) is visiting Silver hatch. As is Mamma Mia… serious competition ensues!

programme.title: How The Hatch Was Won
programme.desc: Tin Top is feeling homesick so Big Chris tries to cheer him up. But who could that pesky varmint causing trouble on the track be?!

programme.title: Go Gadget James And Maxi
programme.desc: Maxi is jealous of all of James' gadgets, or more precisely, the attention the other cars give him. He persuades Molecom to devise some gadgets for him… with hilarious results

programme.title: Mr Carburettor Or Bust
programme.desc: Mr Carburettor has commissioned a bust of himself for Silver Hatch. Disaster strikes when it is dropped, Big Chris tries to make amends, while Marsha distracts Mr Carburettor and the reporter

programme.title: The Case Of The Missing Players
programme.desc: It's time for the Toyland football match but the game can't go ahead until Noddy finds the missing players. Noddy discovers that someone misdirected Pat Pat and Deltoid so that they'd miss the match. Noddy finds the missing players and reunites everyone at the real football pitch but then Hoof disappears. Noddy discovers that Hoof misdirected the others because he wanted to be the best player.

programme.title: The Case Of The Changed Basketball Hoop
programme.desc: Noddy's about to play a game of basketball with Big Ears and Deltoid when he realizes that the hoop has been fiddled with. Who could've done that and why? Noddy's investigation leads him to Fuse, who explains that he just wanted to help the toys that weren't as skilled as him. Everyone practises and realises that the best way to improve at sport is to keep practising. Well done Noddy.

programme.title: The Case Of The Ruined Crops
programme.desc: Farmer Tom is confused and upset when he finds all his trees and corn knocked over. Noddy decides to investigate: who spoiled Farmer Tom's crops? He soon discovers lots of strange heavy bags scattered all over the farm. Whose are they? Where did they come from? And what could they possibly have to do with Smartysaurus's new hot air balloon?

programme.title: The Case Of The Broken Pulley
programme.desc: The Head Builder isn't happy. Someone's been playing with the builders' stuff and now their pulley doesn't work. Noddy decides he needs to find out who did it before anything else goes wrong. Who broke the Builders' pulley?

programme.title: Cakey’s Cupcake Cousins
programme.desc: When Gabby unboxes a tin full of Cakey-like cupcake kitties, she realizes... Cakey's Cousins are coming to visit! Cakey welcomes his Cousins to the dollhouse and leads them through a fun-filled itinerary of activities, but quickly realizes his cousins have an agenda of their own. For our Gabby Cat of the Day segment, Pillow Cat sings a song!

programme.title: Gabby, I Shrunk the Kitties!
programme.desc: Gabby and Pandy accidentally get turned teeny-tiny when one of Mercat's potions spills. To get back to their normal size, they need to find the right ingredients to make a grow potion, which means going on an itty-bitty search through the dollhouse! For our Cat of the Day segment, Mercat shows us how to make sparkly, mermaid slime.

programme.title: Hot, Hot, Hot
programme.desc: Aggro is embarrassed about big changes she's going through. And when she gets stuck in a volcano, the Rescue Riders seek help from ... Magnus?

programme.title: Hot, Hot, Hot
programme.desc: When a mama Ironclaw dragon gets caught high on a mountain with a broken wing, Hannahr the blacksmith has to confront her fear of heights to help out.

programme.title: Delivery Disaster / Slippery Business
programme.desc: When Donna's delivery truck breaks down, it's up to the crew to help Donna continue delivering packages to Harmony Harbor's residents. / When the crew takes on a mission to rescue a lost pet, Ellie must face her fears in order to help save the day.

programme.title: Escape The Backpack / Play Date
programme.desc: While helping Lola pack for her first day of camp, the Dews get stuck inside her backpack! Using the random items inside, the Dews get crafty in their attempt to break out. / When Eden and Phoebe join Harper and Marcus for a playdate, the Dews disagree on what activity their kids should do, ultimately learning that there are lots of ways to play!

programme.title: The Case Of The Missing Players
programme.desc: It's time for the Toyland football match but the game can't go ahead until Noddy finds the missing players. Noddy discovers that someone misdirected Pat Pat and Deltoid so that they'd miss the match. Noddy finds the missing players and reunites everyone at the real football pitch but then Hoof disappears. Noddy discovers that Hoof misdirected the others because he wanted to be the best player.

programme.title: The Case Of The Changed Basketball Hoop
programme.desc: Noddy's about to play a game of basketball with Big Ears and Deltoid when he realizes that the hoop has been fiddled with. Who could've done that and why? Noddy's investigation leads him to Fuse, who explains that he just wanted to help the toys that weren't as skilled as him. Everyone practises and realises that the best way to improve at sport is to keep practising. Well done Noddy.

programme.title: The Case Of The Ruined Crops
programme.desc: Farmer Tom is confused and upset when he finds all his trees and corn knocked over. Noddy decides to investigate: who spoiled Farmer Tom's crops? He soon discovers lots of strange heavy bags scattered all over the farm. Whose are they? Where did they come from? And what could they possibly have to do with Smartysaurus's new hot air balloon?

programme.title: The Case Of The Broken Pulley
programme.desc: The Head Builder isn't happy. Someone's been playing with the builders' stuff and now their pulley doesn't work. Noddy decides he needs to find out who did it before anything else goes wrong. Who broke the Builders' pulley?

programme.title: Doodlebook
programme.desc: Gabby unboxes a cup of crayons and a coloring book with the same doodle on every page. When she takes it into The dollhouse each of the Gabby Cats sees something different in the doodle and turns it into a uniquely magical drawing. But when CatRat gets stuck inside the book, Gabby and Pandy must go on a doodle rescue mission to save him.

programme.title: Dollhouse Safari
programme.desc: It's time for a safari adventure in the dollhouse! Carlita, decked out like a safari truck, takes Gabby and Pandy on an adventure through the dollhouse as they follow clues to find the mysterious Felis Catus and discover all kinds of other dollhouse wildlife along the way! For the COTD segment, Cakey and Parrot show us how to make adorable safari snacks.

programme.title: Message in a Bubble / Glitteretti
programme.desc: Kelp has a new trick with his bubbles: he can have his friends put voice messages inside that you hear when you pop them. But when Pixie decides she doesn’t want the others to hear what’s in her bubble, the chase is on to rescue it! / Juniper is devastated when the traditional ceremony to celebrate her next level of spark achievement can’t happen. Kelp helps introduce a new tradition.

programme.title: Talent Show / Sad Sad Plant
programme.desc: Kelp writes a song about him and Scallop to perform at the unicorn show. But when it comes time, Scallop wants to keep the song "just for them", leaving Kelp to come up with anew act- and fast! / The kids all visit the magical musical plant greenhouse on Unicorn Land. They each pick a plant to take care of, and for Kelp it’s a sad, almost dead plant that he falls in love with.

programme.title: Mom for a Day / Kitty in the City
programme.desc: When Mom is sick on a busy day at home, Tag offers to pick up the slack and take on her tasks for the day. Tag handles it at first, but when the responsibilities start to stack up, she realizes that being Mom is much harder than she thought. \ Tag and Scooch are excited to get to know Kit, who has organized a bunch of cat-ivities for the day. But when Kit realizes she accidentally scratched up Frank and Beans’s tree, she, Tag and Scooch find a way to make it up to them.

programme.title: The Itch To Switch / Mismatched Socks
programme.desc: When Tag is frustrated living in a crowded house, and Scooch is bored in a quiet house, the two friends switch houses for the day. At first they both love their new lives. But as Scooch gets overwhelmed by all the activity at The Barker house, and Tag gets bored by the quiet life at the Pooch’s, they eagerly switch back before the day is done. \ When the Pawston Get Sox go on a losing streak, Tag and Scooch come up with the idea to have a team mascot.

programme.title: New Tail
programme.desc: D-Structs loses his wrecking ball tail and wants to prove he's still dangerous, but when he gets stuck the crew must decide if they will save him.

programme.title: Lucky and La Voltereta Feroz
programme.desc: While Lucky and Spirit struggle to find their place In the circus, Pru and Abigail set out across the frontier to track down their runaway friend

programme.title: Zero Dunk Thunky / Pie Vs Pie
programme.desc: Thunk is captured by the Broods and develops feelings for Blurg /At the Valley's food competition, Thunk and Ugga mistakenly make a new hit food

programme.title: Super Smash Siblings / A Hole In Grug
programme.desc: Eep and Thunk compete against their classmates in "Ahhh-Smashin"/After being denied a spot on the Valley's Wall of Fame, Grug creates a new game

programme.title: Quake, Rattle And Roll
programme.desc: Fishlegs and Meatlug liberate the Gronckles from a menacing dragon that has encroached on their ancestral home, Dark Deep.

programme.title: Have Dragon Will Travel Pt 1
programme.desc: The Dragon Riders are surprised to discover who is behind recent attacks on nearby ships - and to learn exactly what the ships are.

programme.title: One Last Job
programme.desc: The team plans a heist in order to obtain the enchanted pendant that can lead them to the storm wheels. Elsewhere, Klaus and Veruca shipwreck on a mysterious island that is actually home to the mages, and also the Tianshang weapon helmet.

programme.title: Doom and Groom
programme.desc: Po and the team have one last attempt to get the pendant, but they will have to disrupt Jayesh's wedding, and contend with his guards, to do so. At the mage island, Klaus and Veruca get hold of the Tianshang helmet.

programme.title: Mission to CATurn
programme.desc: When CatRat gets stuck on planet Caturn, it's up to Gabby and Pandy to go save him. DJ Catnip teaches them a song to remember how to get there and Baby Box helps them make jetpacks so they can zip around. In the Cat-osphere, they take a twirl through Space Swirls and zip through the Supergallactic Doughnut Hole and even meet DJ Catnip's cousin, DJ Comet! For the Cat of the Day Segment, Baby Box and DJ Comet show us how to craft a papier-mâché Caturn.

programme.title: Cupcake Tree
programme.desc: When the Gabby Cats get stuck in the leaves of an overgrown cupcake tree, it's up to Gabby, Pandy and cupcake-expert Cakey to work together to shrink the overgrown cupcake tree branch by branch--and to save CatRat from where he's stuck at the top! For our COTD segment, Cakey sings a song!

programme.title: The Fairy Festival!
programme.desc: Kitty Fairy's garden is transformed into a fairy-riffic fairground for The Fairy Festival! At the festival, Gabby and Pandy meet an excitable little fairy named Luli-loo who joins them as they explore the festival. Luli-loo may not be the best at all the fair games, but she's never afraid to give it a go and learn from her mistakes!

programme.title: Picture Perfect
programme.desc: Tim and Boss Baby want to bond with Dad by recreating a perfect "Dudes Weekend' camping trip, culminating in a photo opp, but everything seems to go wrong

programme.title: Play It Again, Tim
programme.desc: When Tim is forced to take piano lessons, he actually enjoys them and Boss Baby realizes that Tim is being brainwashed by his piano teacher, slowly turning Tim into an old man

programme.title: Research & Developments
programme.desc: Turtleneck wants to crack the Stinkless Serum formula and makes it a competition, pitting worker babies against worker babies, stating that the first one to the Serum will be the new CEO!

programme.title: Captain Underpants and the Taxing Trauma of the Treacherous Tattle Trials Part I
programme.desc: In part one of a two-part season finale, the Melvins create a final exam that George and Harold will be sure to fail: the Doom Dome. To ensure success, Melvinborg injects Melvin's cells with nanobots, giving him heightened powers. But when George and Harold find out, they crank the nanobots to the max, causing Melvin to grow into a giant! The boys enlist Captain Underpants to fight the jealous nerd, but their victory only loses the nanobots onto Piqua...

programme.title: Captain Underpants and the Taxing Trauma of the Treacherous Tattle Trials Part II
programme.desc: Part two of the season finale finds George, Harold, Captain Underpants, and the Melvins trapped in the Doom Dome with rampaging nanobots. When the humans try to neautralize the bots, they find a new host: Captain Underpants. Now they must shrink down to go into Captain Underpants’ brain and defeat the nanobots’ leader, Nanozero. But they need help: Captain Underpants’ brain cells to the rescue! And when it’s all over, George and Harold will finally be able to go to summer camp.

programme.title: Captain Underpants and the Worrisome Wedge of the Water Warmongers
programme.desc: Harold and George can't wait to spend the summer together at camp. But not so fast, boys -- your old nemesis Mr. Krupp has a most unpleasant surprise.

programme.title: The Dead End
programme.desc: The team travels to Nihaya, or "The Dead End," in their pursuit of Nowhere’s mission. Unfortunately they run into some of Layla’s spurned former criminal partner Sandocal, who steals the kids’ cars for revenge on Layla. With Frostee, Cisco, and Echo held captive, Tony and Layla drive for Sandocal in a dune buggy race to win back their crew’s freedom.

programme.title: The Empty Well
programme.desc: The kids are low on supplies in the Sahara and stumble on a town with a well that has mysteriously run dry. The crew decides to investigate and discovers a Cleve Kelso-controlled water facility that’s stealing water from the village. They manage to blow up the facility, but it alerts Rafaela and Matsuo to their whereabouts.

programme.title: The Hunt
programme.desc: In an awesome chase/battle through the desert, the crew goes up against Rafaela, Matsuo, and Sandocal - who are driving the kids’ own cars. The crew struggles to fight back while also not losing the trail to Cleve’s base in the desert. When Rafaela turns on Sandocal, he and Layla decide to work together and manage to overpower Rafaela and Matsuo. Sandocal tells the kids to go to escape toward the Bedouin Shield.

programme.title: Shell Shocked Part 2
programme.desc: An extremely powerful new dragon attacks Dragon's Edge, and Hiccup makes a dangerous alliance while the fate of the Dragon Eye hangs in the balance.

programme.title: Enemy Of My Enemy
programme.desc: After Hiccup is shot down on a remote island while searching for Viggo and the Dragon Hunters, he questions Dagur's intentions to rescue him.

programme.title: Crash Course
programme.desc: When a dangerous subterranean Cavern Crasher dragon invades the Fireworm Queen's underground nest, she approaches the Riders on Dragon's Edge for help.

programme.title: The Eternal Knight Pt. 2
programme.desc: To end the Eternal Night, Jim and the Trollhuntersmust risk everything in their battle against Gunmar.

programme.title: Escape From The Darklands
programme.desc: Toby, Claire, and Blinky work to keep the human world unaware of Jim’s absence as they look for ways to rescue him from the Darklands

programme.title: Skullcrusher
programme.desc: When Jim is imprisoned in the Darklands, Blinky tries to decipher the Amulet to save him while Claire, Toby, and NotEnrique race to recover the Killahead Bridge before it's too late

programme.title: A Thread In The Dark
programme.desc: Klaus is injured and Veruca’s mage powers are not working, stifled by her time in prison. They encounter a dangerous village and Veruca reconnects with her abilities in time to save Klaus, but the two are soon captured by Po and Blade, who are unaware of Veruca’s rekindled powers.

programme.title: Slow Boat to England
programme.desc: Po and Blade head to the docks to take Klaus and Veruca to England, and Po tries to have fun with her on their last day together. However, Klaus and Veruca break free and hold Po hostage; Blade shockingly gives up the location of the fire whip to save him.

programme.title: Adipursh
programme.desc: Raghav, the prince of the Ikshvaku dynasty from Kosala, tries to rescue his wife, Janaki, from the demon king Lankesh.

programme.title: LaLiga 2025/26: Espanyol vs Levante (Live)
programme.desc: Extensive coverage from every round of the Spanish LaLiga, Spain's top division of football with the World's biggest teams.

programme.title: LaLiga 2025/26: Osasuna vs Sevilla
programme.desc: Extensive coverage from every round of the Spanish LaLiga, Spain's top division of football with the World's biggest teams.

programme.title: Barcelona
programme.desc: Highlights of the eleventh season of the premier European endurance support series, featuring a record 45-car grid across LMP3 and GT3 classes

programme.title: LFCTV 2025/26: Liverpool vs Crystal Palace
programme.desc: Enjoy every Liverpool match from the Premier League, FA Cup and Carabao Cup and friendlies, from LFCTV on beIN SPORTS

programme.title: LFC Trending 2025/26
programme.desc: The official LFCTV weekly magazine program featuring news, stories, videos and social media highlights from across Liverpool football club, its players and supporters

programme.title: Mini Match - LaLiga 2025/26: Real Betis vs Real Madrid
programme.desc: Exclusive coverage from the Spanish LaLiga, Spain's top division of football, with the world's biggest teams and best players.

programme.title: Mini Match - LaLiga 2025/26: Getafe vs Barcelona
programme.desc: Exclusive coverage from the Spanish LaLiga, Spain's top division of football, with the world's biggest teams and best players.

programme.title: LaLiga 2025/26: Atletico Madrid vs Athletic Bilbao
programme.desc: Extensive coverage from every round of the Spanish LaLiga, Spain's top division of football with the World's biggest teams.

programme.title: LaLiga 2025/26: Getafe vs Barcelona
programme.desc: Extensive coverage from every round of the Spanish LaLiga, Spain's top division of football with the World's biggest teams.

programme.title: Rally Islas Canarias
programme.desc: Enjoy highlights from the 54th season of the World Rally Championship

programme.title: Day 4 Session 2 Tie 3: Denmark vs Ukraine (C1)
programme.desc: The Thomas & Uber Cup are the pinnacle of international team badminton, bringing together the world's top nations to battle for the prestigious titles. The Thomas Cup was first staged in 1948-49, and the Uber Cup was added for the first time in 1956-7. The Thomas Cup is the prize awarded for the World Men's Team Championships, while the Uber Cup is the prize for the World Women's Team Championships.

programme.title: UCI Pro Series - Tour of Oman Stage 2 H/Ls
programme.desc: Catch breathtaking moments from Stage 2 of the Tour of Oman where cyclists start at the Al Rustaq Fort and finish at Yitti Hills.

programme.title: IEB+ Argentina Open (250) Final
programme.desc: The IEB+ Argentina Open is a professional tennis tournament in Buenos Aires, held annually on clay courts at the Buenos Aires Lawn Tennis Club. It's a key stop in the South American "Golden Swing," showcasing both established stars and rising talent.

programme.title: Upper Austria Ladies Linz (500) Final
programme.desc: The Upper Austria Ladies Linz is a professional women's tennis tournament in the WTA Tour, first held in 1987. It is held at the Design Center Linz in Austria, featuring top-ranked players on indoor surfaces.

programme.title: Mutua Madrid Open (1000) Day 6 R3 Session 4
programme.desc: The Mutua Madrid Open is a premier tournament held annually on clay courts at the Caja Mágica in Madrid, Spain. As one of three elite European clay-court Masters events, it features a 96-player singles draw and attracts top-tier talent.

programme.title: Mutua Madrid Open (1000) R16 Session 4

programme.title: Day 5 Session 1 Tie 1: Chinese Taipei vs Indonesia (C1)
programme.desc: The Thomas & Uber Cup are the pinnacle of international team badminton, bringing together the world's top nations to battle for the prestigious titles. The Thomas Cup was first staged in 1948-49, and the Uber Cup was added for the first time in 1956-7. The Thomas Cup is the prize awarded for the World Men's Team Championships, while the Uber Cup is the prize for the World Women's Team Championships.

programme.title: 巨塔之后
programme.desc: 【附中英文字幕】一妍成功进入董事会之外，路沙马集团主席方欣亦成为新董事；方欣更直接向一妍宣战。一妍再次要求以珈、丽雪入董事会，惟以珈仍坚决拒绝。明塱医院爆出医疗事故，丽雪的弟弟陈宇泽牵涉其中。丽雪帮忙拆局时，发现事件背后大有文章……以珈心系继女王海淳的前途，希望海淳按照启聪遗愿，前赴英国升读大学，但海淳坚拒不从，二人闹翻。

programme.title: 逍遥
programme.desc: 【附中英文字幕】讲述了生性洒脱的少女肖瑶（谭松韵饰）误入万妖谷引发风波，与万妖之王红烨（侯明昊饰）共同卷入神秘怪案。

programme.title: 爱．回家之开心速递
programme.desc: 故事主要围绕“熊氏一家”在家中的生活点滴和工作上的繁忙。

programme.title: 星河长明
programme.desc: 樊如晦试图陷害叶凌霜，但叶凌霜机智应对，反使樊如晦计划落空。同时，彧修明利用叶凌霜的才智，成功让樊如晦填补国库的空缺。在夜北，七海伶和界诸婴回到部落，却接到彧修明的赐婚圣旨，引发族人的误解和不满。另一方面，冷天曦在月圆之夜受月噬影响失控，叶凌霜采取放血的方法帮助她缓解疼痛。

programme.title: 多情城市
programme.desc: 以1960至1970年代九份为背景，述说三个拜把兄弟如何赤手空拳打天下，藉由上一代的爱情故事串连两代之间共同的情感与记忆，深度探索两代之间的价值观差异。

programme.title: ７人的復活
programme.desc: 承接上季《7人的逃脱》剧情，讲述了在假新闻成就的城堡里梦想成为帝王的男人和逃离邪恶的7人的反击。

programme.title: 宴遇永安
programme.desc: 现代少女沈韶光（王影璐饰）与家人意外穿越至永安城，通过经营小饭馆结识京兆少尹林晏（李昀锐饰），以未婚妻身份化解危机后入住其府邸云水苑，展开融合美食经营、市井民俗的爱情。

programme.title: 爱．回家之开心速递
programme.desc: 故事主要围绕“熊氏一家”在家中的生活点滴和工作上的繁忙。

programme.title: 生活在別处的我
programme.desc: 普通女孩夏果（钟楚曦饰）面临一个艰难的抉择，她会选择和男友在家乡过安稳温馨的生活，还是抓住机会在大城市追求事业成功？

programme.title: 生活在別处的我
programme.desc: 普通女孩夏果（钟楚曦饰）面临一个艰难的抉择，她会选择和男友在家乡过安稳温馨的生活，还是抓住机会在大城市追求事业成功？

programme.title: 宴遇永安
programme.desc: 现代少女沈韶光（王影璐饰）与家人意外穿越至永安城，通过经营小饭馆结识京兆少尹林晏（李昀锐饰），以未婚妻身份化解危机后入住其府邸云水苑，展开融合美食经营、市井民俗的爱情。

programme.title: 黑色月光
programme.desc: 十八年前，振强奉哲贤之命处理掉满月、曦晨；如今振强再次受命于文海，跟踪调查满月。满月为部署复仇大计，早已偷偷接近振强的儿子莫家朗，并成为好友。文海暗中撤走满月在宝鐷建设的公关职务，满月转为接近慧云，力求取得其信任。宝鐷建设将会启动旧区重建计划，哲贤决定交由基俊负责，基俊答应全力以赴。

programme.title: 多情城市
programme.desc: 以1960至1970年代九份为背景，述说三个拜把兄弟如何赤手空拳打天下，藉由上一代的爱情故事串连两代之间共同的情感与记忆，深度探索两代之间的价值观差异。

programme.title: 巨塔之后
programme.desc: 【附中英文字幕】医疗事故越闹越大，副院长英杰更有利益输送之嫌。方欣为了让英杰在董事会投她一票于背后操控事件；一妍看准以珈的正义感，放消息让以珈介入医疗事故。以珈得知海淳到了首尔，立即飞抵当地，成功救了遇险的海淳。以珈与受了伤的海淳回港，以珈对前来探望的一妍大兴问罪……

programme.title: 逍遥
programme.desc: 【附中英文字幕】讲述了生性洒脱的少女肖瑶（谭松韵饰）误入万妖谷引发风波，与万妖之王红烨（侯明昊饰）共同卷入神秘怪案。

programme.title: 星河长明
programme.desc: 叶凌霜帮助冷天曦缓解月噬之苦，得到彧修明的赏赐。在准备解开南宫封印的过程中，叶凌霜被彧修明发现，却意外召唤出一条绿龙。在搏斗过程中，彧修明展现出伤口快速愈合的能力。最后，他们成功让绿龙躲回水中。

programme.desc: Watches, speakers, toilets... Maestro takes a fascinating look at some of our most everyday objects, both old and new. How exactly to they work? What is their history?

programme.desc: At 6 years old the cheerful mischievous Koumi dreams of knowing all the animals in the world. Thanks to her picture book, she's able to head off and meet them.

programme.title: Belles Comptines D'afrique
programme.desc: In each episode, an animal from the African continent is highlighted in song.

programme.desc: The Bastide, Estrela, Salama, Levy, Berville and Alami families, plus a host of supporting characters, live and work in the modern everyday city of Montpellier, in southern France. Between romance and crime thriller, with a blend of comic and serious themes, their stories weave a fascinating web.

programme.title: Le Point
programme.desc: Magazine programme which explores issues relating to society, science and the environment, involving investigations and in-depth analysis, from a resolutely Canadian perspective.

programme.title: Le Journal De France 2
programme.desc: The television news programme of the France 2 editorial board (1 p.m. edition, Paris time).

programme.title: Paris La Blanche
programme.desc: Nour has been in Paris for nearly fifty years. At 70, his wife Rekia leaves Algeria for the first time to persuade him to return home to his village there. But after such a long time, the man that she eventually finds has become a stranger.

programme.title: Les Belles Cicatrices
programme.desc: Gaspard is still in love with Leila. One month after she left him, they meet again in a crowded bar. As the reunion goes badly, Gaspard hides under the table.

programme.title: Sami La Fugue
programme.desc: A winter in Franche-Comte. Sami, committed to a psychiatric hospital, receives a visit from his mother and younger sister, who tell him that their mare has died. The news sends everything reeling...

programme.title: For the good of the cause
programme.desc: One morning, two men hold up a butcher's lorry and steal its load of meat. Alex quickly finds the thieves: recently arrived in the region they are ready to do whatever it takes to help those in greatest need. Their plan is to strike increasing-ly harder.

programme.title: 巨塔之后
programme.desc: 【附中英文字幕】一妍成功进入董事会之外，路沙马集团主席方欣亦成为新董事；方欣更直接向一妍宣战。一妍再次要求以珈、丽雪入董事会，惟以珈仍坚决拒绝。明塱医院爆出医疗事故，丽雪的弟弟陈宇泽牵涉其中。丽雪帮忙拆局时，发现事件背后大有文章……以珈心系继女王海淳的前途，希望海淳按照启聪遗愿，前赴英国升读大学，但海淳坚拒不从，二人闹翻。

programme.title: 逍遥
programme.desc: 【附中英文字幕】讲述了生性洒脱的少女肖瑶（谭松韵饰）误入万妖谷引发风波，与万妖之王红烨（侯明昊饰）共同卷入神秘怪案。

programme.title: 爱．回家之开心速递
programme.desc: 故事主要围绕“熊氏一家”在家中的生活点滴和工作上的繁忙。

programme.title: 星河长明
programme.desc: 樊如晦试图陷害叶凌霜，但叶凌霜机智应对，反使樊如晦计划落空。同时，彧修明利用叶凌霜的才智，成功让樊如晦填补国库的空缺。在夜北，七海伶和界诸婴回到部落，却接到彧修明的赐婚圣旨，引发族人的误解和不满。另一方面，冷天曦在月圆之夜受月噬影响失控，叶凌霜采取放血的方法帮助她缓解疼痛。

programme.title: 多情城市
programme.desc: 以1960至1970年代九份为背景，述说三个拜把兄弟如何赤手空拳打天下，藉由上一代的爱情故事串连两代之间共同的情感与记忆，深度探索两代之间的价值观差异。

programme.title: ７人的復活
programme.desc: 承接上季《7人的逃脱》剧情，讲述了在假新闻成就的城堡里梦想成为帝王的男人和逃离邪恶的7人的反击。

programme.title: 宴遇永安
programme.desc: 现代少女沈韶光（王影璐饰）与家人意外穿越至永安城，通过经营小饭馆结识京兆少尹林晏（李昀锐饰），以未婚妻身份化解危机后入住其府邸云水苑，展开融合美食经营、市井民俗的爱情。

programme.title: 爱．回家之开心速递
programme.desc: 故事主要围绕“熊氏一家”在家中的生活点滴和工作上的繁忙。

programme.desc: 以1960至1970年代九份为背景，述说三个拜把兄弟如何赤手空拳打天下，藉由上一代的爱情故事串连两代之间共同的情感与记忆，深度探索两代之间的价值观差异。

programme.title: 巨塔之后
programme.desc: 【附中英文字幕】一妍成功进入董事会之外，路沙马集团主席方欣亦成为新董事；方欣更直接向一妍宣战。一妍再次要求以珈、丽雪入董事会，惟以珈仍坚决拒绝。明塱医院爆出医疗事故，丽雪的弟弟陈宇泽牵涉其中。丽雪帮忙拆局时，发现事件背后大有文章……以珈心系继女王海淳的前途，希望海淳按照启聪遗愿，前赴英国升读大学，但海淳坚拒不从，二人闹翻。

programme.title: 逍遥
programme.desc: 【附中英文字幕】讲述了生性洒脱的少女肖瑶（谭松韵饰）误入万妖谷引发风波，与万妖之王红烨（侯明昊饰）共同卷入神秘怪案。

programme.title: 爱．回家之开心速递
programme.desc: 故事主要围绕“熊氏一家”在家中的生活点滴和工作上的繁忙。

programme.title: 星河长明
programme.desc: 樊如晦试图陷害叶凌霜，但叶凌霜机智应对，反使樊如晦计划落空。同时，彧修明利用叶凌霜的才智，成功让樊如晦填补国库的空缺。在夜北，七海伶和界诸婴回到部落，却接到彧修明的赐婚圣旨，引发族人的误解和不满。另一方面，冷天曦在月圆之夜受月噬影响失控，叶凌霜采取放血的方法帮助她缓解疼痛。

programme.title: 多情城市
programme.desc: 以1960至1970年代九份为背景，述说三个拜把兄弟如何赤手空拳打天下，藉由上一代的爱情故事串连两代之间共同的情感与记忆，深度探索两代之间的价值观差异。

programme.title: 生活在別处的我
programme.desc: 普通女孩夏果（钟楚曦饰）面临一个艰难的抉择，她会选择和男友在家乡过安稳温馨的生活，还是抓住机会在大城市追求事业成功？

programme.title: 生活在別处的我
programme.desc: 普通女孩夏果（钟楚曦饰）面临一个艰难的抉择，她会选择和男友在家乡过安稳温馨的生活，还是抓住机会在大城市追求事业成功？

programme.title: 宴遇永安
programme.desc: 现代少女沈韶光（王影璐饰）与家人意外穿越至永安城，通过经营小饭馆结识京兆少尹林晏（李昀锐饰），以未婚妻身份化解危机后入住其府邸云水苑，展开融合美食经营、市井民俗的爱情。

programme.title: 黑色月光
programme.desc: 十八年前，振强奉哲贤之命处理掉满月、曦晨；如今振强再次受命于文海，跟踪调查满月。满月为部署复仇大计，早已偷偷接近振强的儿子莫家朗，并成为好友。文海暗中撤走满月在宝鐷建设的公关职务，满月转为接近慧云，力求取得其信任。宝鐷建设将会启动旧区重建计划，哲贤决定交由基俊负责，基俊答应全力以赴。

programme.title: 多情城市
programme.desc: 以1960至1970年代九份为背景，述说三个拜把兄弟如何赤手空拳打天下，藉由上一代的爱情故事串连两代之间共同的情感与记忆，深度探索两代之间的价值观差异。

programme.title: 巨塔之后
programme.desc: 【附中英文字幕】医疗事故越闹越大，副院长英杰更有利益输送之嫌。方欣为了让英杰在董事会投她一票于背后操控事件；一妍看准以珈的正义感，放消息让以珈介入医疗事故。以珈得知海淳到了首尔，立即飞抵当地，成功救了遇险的海淳。以珈与受了伤的海淳回港，以珈对前来探望的一妍大兴问罪……

programme.title: 全球大视野
programme.desc: 美中 印太 到两岸 全球新闻不漏接 邀请重量级专家 最权威报导

programme.title: 神打
programme.desc: 浪迹江湖的汪禹，因被揭以木刀伪装刀枪不入，而被村民群起而追。汪脱身回客栈后，发觉师傅江洋已被捕；数警察亦要抓汪，但汪已逃到另一村镇；汪为抱打不平，又在众人前显露神打功夫，乘天将下雨，自谓是东海龙王化身，跳入河中隐身而去，未几，果然大雨如注，众人真以为有神灵出现。后汪遇恍如男孩的少女林珍奇，引为知己，同闯江湖...

programme.title: 香港73
programme.desc: 1973年，香港股市暴涨人人热衷炒卖股票，小市民因急于入住廉租屋而被不法之徒骗取金钱，及教育制度不健全引起民怨等均被改编成电影中的情节。故事讽刺写实，反映了香港当时的真实面貌！

programme.title: 黑鹰
programme.desc: 新加坡的黑鹰组织专与香港保险业作对。私家侦探张世杰从黑鹰领袖陈祖培女儿丽思入手。他俩认识后，不断受到狙击追杀，原来陈祖培于一年前已遭人杀害，胡媚用陈名义发号施令，为非作歹。张世杰与黑鹰集团展开连场激战！

programme.title: 女侠黑蝴蝶
programme.desc: 平时表现得不谙武术的酒铺女子关宝珠，原来是武功了得且专门锄强扶弱的黑蝴蝶。一次黑蝴蝶用从五魔山寨撂夺得来的金子济贫，令她被黑白二道追捕。

programme.title: 我爱金龟婿
programme.desc: 三个香港美少女何莉莉、陈依龄及凌云，带着爱情梦远赴日本大阪，一心指望钓得如意郎君。岂料三人被误会是富家千金，结果惹出趣事连篇。

programme.title: 妖魂
programme.desc: 盛传很多武林中人在一夜间离奇消失，机智少侠欲查明真相，怎料当他发现原来是妖魂作怪时，他自己亦已身陷险境...

programme.title: 乾隆下扬州
programme.desc: 乾隆皇继续微服南巡，这次得大臣和大学士陪行，他们一行三人来到扬州，期间遇上不少趣事。

programme.title: 恶霸
programme.desc: 年轻有为的侦缉队长召集两名狱卒，协助他对付经营赌博的黑帮。

programme.title: 玫瑰我爱你
programme.desc: 十八岁的玫瑰在澳门结识了富家子家聪。太平洋战争爆发，两人被迫分手。七年后，玫瑰得知家聪结婚，伤心痛哭。玫瑰婚后，丈夫去世，开了一间花店，一天，小女孩来买花，才知小女孩是自己女儿，更与家聪重遇...文艺导演秦剑的爱情悲喜剧，保持作深情，感人之水准。

programme.title: 出笼马骝
programme.desc: 故事描述，程小东因误杀罪入狱，一死囚临终前交予他半爿铜牌，嘱他寻找另半爿铜牌，当会知其妙用。后程在狱中结识侯朝声，一同逃狱；逃亡期间二人得悉铜牌牵涉到一段江湖恩怨，且始知彼此身上均有半爿铜牌，一凑合即出现「长白之巅，猛虎之岭」八个字，另有山脉图绞，二人凭线索去到长白山猛虎岭找出「通臂拳」秘笈，遂苦练拳法以力敌追兵...

programme.title: 儿女是我们的
programme.desc: 富家小姐梅淑卿与穷教师江少文，为了自由恋爱，脱离父母，从城市迁往小镇结婚生活。他们生育五个儿女，但生存的担子日重，二人长期辛劳，终相继亡故。小儿女顿失庇荫，直接面对复杂的社会，几乎各散东西......

programme.title: 火并
programme.desc: 大同府著名银号福来钱庄，内储黄金逾百万两，使各方贼寇垂涎。独脚大盗滕奇影本欲邀钱庄护院文礼贤合谋，将钱庄金银据为己有，但文严拒；滕转向白氏姐妹玉燕及玉莺着手，共襄劫金大举......

programme.title: 后门
programme.desc: 本片由著名文学家徐吁的小说《后门》改编，故事讲述徐天鹤与太太结婚多年，膝下犹虚，对隔壁小女孩阿琳甚有好感。阿琳父母离婚，孤苦伶仃，徐太太提议收阿琳为继女，琳父母喜不自胜。后来阿琳亲母史小姐出现，要接回阿琳；徐太太不忍拆散母女骨肉，毅然将阿琳交回亲母。

programme.title: Lookin' Through The Windows
programme.desc: ALF believes he witnessed a homicide at the next-door neighbors' house, and the Tanners are gripped by panic when ALF tells everyone he saw Trevor Ochmonek murder his wife, Raquel.

programme.title: Terror at the Academy
programme.desc: A Vietnam vet with a grudge against cops joins the force in order to get his revenge...from within.

programme.title: The Survival Syndrome
programme.desc: Scanty evidence puts Hooker in the spotlight again after an unarmed car theft suspect is shot and killed; Romano questions his future on the force after taking a bullet himself.

programme.title: Live Bait
programme.desc: The Impossible Missions Force invades the intricate world of spies to protect an American double agent and comes up against a human time bomb.

programme.title: Part 1
programme.desc: The series depicts the stories of Pompeii's citizens with the threat of Mount Vesuvius bringing chaos and destruction. Arbaces's machinations and the persecution of Christians add to the growing tension.

programme.title: To Go or Not to Go, That Is the Question
programme.desc: The High Priestess of Witchdom dethrones Darrin in his own "castle."

programme.title: Part 2
programme.desc: In 1750, Kunta Kinte is captured by slave traders sweeping the countryside. Chained with other captives, Kunta begins an agonized odyssey to the New World.

programme.title: Pop
programme.desc: When a young boy's body is found on a park carousel the detectives_x000D_uncover a disturbing gambling ring

programme.title: It's Not Easy...Bein' Green
programme.desc: ALF gives Brian a good-luck charm when Brian accepts a difficult role in an upcoming school pageant. Brian loses confidence after a classmate pokes fun at him, but with the "charm," he is more courageous.

programme.title: Deadly Ambition
programme.desc: Hooker doesn't believe an over-zealous detective's claim that an old friend was the inside man in a jewelry heist. Jerry Lee Lewis guest stars.

programme.title: A Cry for Help
programme.desc: When Hooker tries helping a young deaf gang member stay out of trouble, he must also protect him from his vengeful gang colleagues.

programme.title: Part 2
programme.desc: In 1750, Kunta Kinte is captured by slave traders sweeping the countryside. Chained with other captives, Kunta begins an agonized odyssey to the New World.

programme.title: Kennedy
programme.desc: John Kennedy wins much acclaim for a speech delivered at the Berlin Wall. Meanwhile in America, Martin Luther King gives his rousing "I have a dream...." speech.

programme.title: The Bunker (Part I)
programme.desc: The IMF races a paid killer who is stalking a nuclear scientist forced by the enemy to work on a device that could upset the world power balance in the first of a two-part episode.

programme.title: The Great Escape
programme.desc: When the Bundy family spends the night in Al's shoe store while their house is being exterminated, Kelly is forced to be especially creative in slipping out for the night.

programme.title: Salem, Here We Come
programme.desc: The Empress Hepzibah's decision that witches and mortals don't mix is delayed.

programme.title: Part 3
programme.desc: Despite a violent rebellion, the slave ship Lord Ligonier completes its voyage in 1767, and Kunta Kinte endures the indignity of an Annapolis slave auction.

programme.title: Part 2
programme.desc: The series depicts the stories of Pompeii's citizens with the threat of Mount Vesuvius bringing chaos and destruction. Arbaces's machinations and the persecution of Christians add to the growing tension.

programme.title: Possessed
programme.desc: A young man finds that his girlfriend Larissa Welsh has been attacked in her apartment with evidence that points to her buried past. Benson and Stabler investigates.

programme.title: 封口者
programme.desc: 罗雪与男友吵架后，出走来到深山民宿与伊伊成为合租室友。一晚，罗雪无意中撞破依依及其友人雷松杀死依依的前男友。为免走漏消息，他们囚禁罗雪于阁楼中。罗雪的知己苏文发现她失踪后，到处找寻她的下落。最后，罗雪及苏文能否成功逃出险境?

programme.title: 卧虎藏龙
programme.desc: 剑侠李慕白将绝世宝剑「青冥剑」托付王爷府保管，岂料竟遭玉娇龙盗去。这位出身高贵却武艺超凡的玉娇龙，师从邪道「碧眼狐狸」。李慕白惜其才华，屡次欲导其向善而未果，二人终究难逃命运纠缠，注定共赴悲剧。

programme.title: 秦明·生死语者
programme.desc: 被誉为"尸语者"的法医秦明常可在尸体身上解剖出重要的线索。在调查一宗谋杀案时，秦明在实习助手和刑警队长的协助下发现了尘封16年的雪山杀人案，同时亦揭发离奇谋杀案背后隐藏着的秘密。

programme.title: 女特警之暗战
programme.desc: 东州地区长期盘踞一支贩毒集团。霹雳女子突击队队员梅静率领其他队员成功攻入贩毒集团的制毒基地，却中了预先设下的埋伏，梅爸爸是犯罪集团内部的卧底身份亦随之暴露。最后，梅静与突击队员们经历一轮激战后，击败对手，并救出梅爸爸。

programme.title: 柠檬可乐
programme.desc: 就读女校高中的婷婷，因排演《罗密欧与茱丽叶》而与邻校男生Jackson戏假情真，爱情就在排练时萌芽。这是婷婷的初恋，但Jaskson却是一个变幻莫测的爱情玩家...

programme.title: 叶问 2
programme.desc: 日本侵华后，咏春大师叶问与家人因生活艰难离开佛山，远赴香港开馆收徒，希望可以开展新生活。但事情并未如所想般容易，他欲在香港开武馆，就必须接受各大门派的挑战。一场又一场的功夫较量正式展开！

programme.title: 我爱罗兰度
programme.desc: Lolanto自命风流，一次因伤入院结识了富商的弱智独生女儿阿蚊，她如小孩般天真可爱，渐渐更与Lolanto成为好友。蚊父因此聘请Lolanto来照顾她。不久，蚊入院做智力恢复手术，但恢复智力后的阿蚊与Lolanto建立的情谊却黯然离去...

programme.title: 摩登仙履奇缘
programme.desc: 陈七是职业惯匪，偷呃拐骗无所不为，但从不使用暴力；张曼珠是电视台新晋演员，收入微薄，生活拮据。一次偶然中，陈得到了一枚巨钻，欲找买家脱手，却遇杀手追杀，情急下将巨钻藏于某鞋店的一只高跟鞋内，后来，此鞋刚好被张买去参加舞会......

programme.title: 零号追杀
programme.desc: 退出江湖的特工华叔，在老街以开古董店为生。一天，老街遭当地青龙帮强拆时，华叔隐藏的身份被暴露，并受到阿杰为首的神秘组织追杀，由此展开了一场双雄对决!

programme.title: 赌城大亨之新哥传奇
programme.desc: 取材自澳门赌王何鸿燊的真人真事，讲述由1930至1960年代赌王努力打拼至事业高峰的故事。1941年日本入侵香港，年青大学生贺新逃离香港奔赴澳门。贺新起初在码头做苦力，凭着他的胆色过人、刻苦耐劳和聪明机智，最终登上澳门博彩业的第一把交椅。

programme.title: 鹿鼎记 II
programme.desc: 「神龙教」教主龙儿奉命协助吴三桂推翻康熙皇帝，却反遭吴三桂陷害，幸得韦小宝相救才得以保命。于是龙儿以身相许，并把绝世武功传于韦小宝以对付吴三桂。最后，韦小宝更意外地从四十二章经中得知满清龙脉的秘密宝藏。

programme.title: 种鬼
programme.desc: 故事描述，计程车司机周通(高飞饰)之妻艾莲(玄智慧饰)红杏出墙，搭上赌场常客方明(徐少强饰)。一日，艾与方争执后独自离去，却被流氓挟往荒屋施暴，艾极力反抗，终堕楼惨死。周受一股神秘力量引导，发现艾尸首，蒙眬间，闻鬼语遣其往找巫师设法报仇。自始怪事接连发生，所有与艾之死有关的人均遭鬼怪缠扰...

programme.title: Manchester United v Brentford (MW34) (Live)
programme.desc: Live match action from the latest match round of the Premier League, with insight, analysis, and reaction from our expert panel of studio guests.

programme.title: PREMIER LEAGUE LIVE (Live)
programme.desc: Highlight match action from the Premier League's 2025/26 season.

programme.title: THE FINAL WORD - MON 27 APR (Live)
programme.desc: Linked to Monday night fixtures, Michael Owen and special guests will join Steve Bower to give the definitive verdict on the weekend's action.

programme.title: EXTRA TIME - MON 27 APR (Live)
programme.desc: A look at a Premier League season through the eyes of a player who excelled that particular year. The highs and lows and everything in between, that made it a memorable and at times defining nine months for both the player and his club.

programme.title: THE BIG INTERVIEW
programme.desc: Diego Gomez's path to the Premier League has been shaped across continents. Beginning his career in Paraguay, the midfielder earned a move to Inter Miami, where he developed his game alongside some of football's biggest names such as Lionel Messi. In 2025, Gomez made the switch to Brighton and the Premier League. Now on the South Coast, Gomez is establishing himself as an important part of the Seagulls' team.

programme.title: PL STORIES
programme.desc: We celebrate the rise of Norwegian striking power in the Premier League, exploring how a golden generation in the late 1990s; featuring pioneers like Ole Gunnar Solskjær and Tore Andre Flo helped shatter stereotypes and establish Norway as an unlikely breeding ground for elite forwards.

programme.title: REVIEW - MON 27 APR
programme.desc: Review brings you all the action from Matchweek 34. Friday's game sees Sunderland host Nottingham Forest, Arsenal welcome Newcastle, Liverpool take on Crystal Palace, and Manchester United close out the round against Brentford.

programme.title: MATCH HIGHLIGHTS 25/26 MW34 Manchester United v Brentford
programme.desc: Each Premier League game from the 2025/26 season condensed into an individual 26-minute highlights show.

programme.title: NETBUSTERS
programme.desc: Fast-paced with music, ISO angles, and commentary, Netbusters offers an alternative review of every goal and key moment from the latest round of Premier League fixtures.

programme.title: Miss Rabbit's Taxi
programme.desc: Miss Rabbit spends the day picking people up and dropping people off in her job as taxi driver.

programme.title: Playing Pretend
programme.desc: Peppa and her friends learn how to play games of pretend.

programme.title: Peppa's Circus
programme.desc: Grandpa Pig has put up a tent in his garden. Peppa and her friends decide it's a perfect place to put on a circus. With Peppa as the ringmaster, the show can begin!

programme.title: The Fish Pond
programme.desc: Daddy Pig takes Peppa and George to see a fish pond he used to visit when he was a little piggy. He is a little surprised to learn that a few things have changed since then.

programme.title: The Olden Days
programme.desc: Mummy Pig shows Peppa and her friend Suzy Sheep old photographs from when they were babies. Peppa and Suzy don't remember being that young but are pleased to see that they've always been best friends.

programme.title: Snowy Mountain
programme.desc: Peppa and her friends are on Snowy Mountain learning how to ski. Their teacher, Madame Gazelle is very good at skiing and was once a world champion! But in the end it is Mummy Pig who impresses everyone...

programme.title: Castle
programme.desc: Mummy and Daddy Pig take Peppa and George on a visit to a castle!

programme.title: Summer Camp I / Summer Camp II
programme.desc: Barbapapa and Barbamama have announced to their dear barbababies that they are going on a trip to Easter Island. // The Barbababies, the twins, and Mr. Strict set sail on "Thesee", a magnificent sailboat.

programme.title: Dreams And Illusions / Dreaming Apprentices
programme.desc: While everyone sleeps peacefully, one may wonder what the Barbababies could be dreaming about. // To dream makes you grow... But what can Barbidur, Barbalala, Barbotine and Barbidou possibly dream of?

programme.title: Birthday Party / Tick Tock Mr. Croc
programme.desc: Mr. Crocodile wants to be a good guest at Daisy's birthday party since he's never been to one before. // Rushing to get to a concert on time, Mr. Crocodile and Daisy misplace their tickets at Mom's Box and Ship Shop.

programme.title: Truck Rangers
programme.desc: Blaze and his friends have joined the Truck Rangers, a scouting club where trucks earn badges for their accomplishments. But when Crusher's selfish scouting lands everyone in a heap of trouble, Blaze must race to the rescue!

programme.title: Trouble at the Truck Wash
programme.desc: When an overeager Crusher causes the Truck Wash to explode out into Axle City, Blaze and friends will need your help using angles to recover the pieces and get the trucks clean again!

programme.title: The Crew Builds A Castle Show
programme.desc: Park Ranger Rose and Rosie the goat are putting on a show! But when Rosie disappears, can the pups find her before showtime?

programme.title: The Crew Builds A Fancy Drive-Thru Restaurant
programme.desc: When Camila the truck driver needs a place to stop and eat, the pups and Cafe Carl have a fancy idea. But is it too fancy?

programme.title: The Crew Builds Charger A Super Bed / The Crew Builds A Super Squirrely Whirly Playground
programme.desc: Charger has a problem... he's got too much energy to sleep! Lucky for him, Rubble & Crew knows there's always a construction solution. // Rubble and the pups build Mix, Motor, Lucas, and Lily the coolest Super Squirrely Whirly playdate ever!

programme.title: Pups Save Queen Cluck-Cluck / Pups Save a Desert Flounder
programme.desc: Mayor Goodway dreams she's travelled to the mysterious Cluck Cluck Island-a very strange land where Chickaletta is royalty! // Travelling Travis's balloon gets caught on the Flounder, Travis and Cap'n Turbot wind up all the way out into the desert.

programme.title: Pups Save a Trash-Dinger / Pups Save the Royal Armor
programme.desc: Mayor Humdinger's trash-compacting truck is messing up the beach. It's up to Rocky's new Re-Use It Truck to help save a rescue! // Gift for the Princess been scattered all over town. It's up to Rocky's Re-Use It Truck to put her gifts back together!

programme.title: The Tenderest Bond of All / The Orange Empire
programme.desc: While the family makes pottery, Barbabravo and Barbabright try to set the world record for the largest cheese souffle. // The Barbapapas decide to go to the park. While her brother and sisters play , Barbalib can't help to control everything.

programme.title: It's Only a Mystery... / The Battle
programme.desc: Taking after his favourite detective, Barbabravo looks for a case to solve. Can he solve the mystery of the missing ice statue? // Inspired by their favourite heroes, the Barbababies make costumes. But no heroes are possible without villains...

programme.desc: Tim, Tommy & Tia find a lost toy and vow to return it to its owner. // Kai is super excited to ride the Nebulator, but Tim isn't so sure. // Tim and Kai try to photograph the illusive SpaceBug.

programme.desc: Big Red Chicken accidentally shrinks Dora and Boots so it's up to Dora's little brother and sister to help get them big again. // Dora rescues Boots and her friends from Benny's out-of-control balloon so they can all go to La Reina's castle party.

programme.title: 综艺大热门24
programme.desc: 由幽默风趣的吴宗宪、陈汉典、黃路梓茵联手主持带您闹翻天！最强综艺节目保证娱乐性十足，让你笑声不断，千万别错过。

programme.title: 幸福来了
programme.desc: 高家兄弟因为价值观截然不同，不但成就高低立判，连教育出来的子女，个性和品格也大相径庭。上一代有上一代的恩怨情报，下一代有下一代的追求展望；在错综复杂的人生大道上，每个人都汲汲营营，寻找着属于自己的幸福课题。

programme.title: 多情城市
programme.desc: 以1960至1970年代九份为背景，述说三个拜把兄弟如何赤手空拳打天下，藉由上一代的爱情故事串连两代之间共同的情感与记忆，深度探索两代之间的价值观差异。

programme.title: 市井豪门

programme.title: 幸福来了
programme.desc: 高家兄弟因为价值观截然不同，不但成就高低立判，连教育出来的子女，个性和品格也大相径庭。上一代有上一代的恩怨情报，下一代有下一代的追求展望；在错综复杂的人生大道上，每个人都汲汲营营，寻找着属于自己的幸福课题。
